programme.title: Death Race 2000
programme.desc: In a dystopian future, a cross country race requires contestants to run down innocent pedestrians. Satirical sci-fi thriller, starring David Carradine and Sylvester Stallone.

programme.title: Meet the Spartans
programme.desc: From the creators of Date Movie comes this tongue-in-cheek parody of the sword-and-sandal epics, dubbed Meet The Spartans.

programme.title: Modern Times
programme.desc: The Tramp struggles to live in modern industrial society with the help of a young homeless woman.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: A young finance executive inherits her uncle's mountain cabin only to discover that he also left half of it to the ruggedly handsome handyman that had been caring for it.

programme.title: The dating list
programme.desc: (2019) Witty work romance with Natalie Dreyfuss. To secure a promotion, Abby must find her boss the perfect man. But when she finds a guy who ticks all her boxes too, will he be too perfect to let go?

programme.title: Where Angels Fear to Tread
programme.desc: A rich Edwardian widow impulsively marries a poor Italian, tragically dying in childbirth. Her in-laws try to gain custody of the baby. Stars Helen Mirren, Helena Bonham Carter, Rupert Graves

programme.title: Legend
programme.desc: In a land where beauty is preserved by innocence, two young people become ensnared in the battle between good and evil.

programme.title: Dying for the Crown
programme.desc: A woman finds herself the focus of a former classmate's plan for revenge after they reunite at their high school reunion. Stars April Bowlby, Deborah Twiss

programme.title: InstaFame
programme.desc: When a selfie turns fatal, a mother must protect her daughter from her best friend who is obsessed with social media.

programme.title: Triple Cross
programme.desc: Imprisoned in Jersey at the time of the German invasion, double agent Eddie Chapman offers to spy for the Nazis in exchange for money and freedom.

programme.title: There Was A Crooked Man
programme.desc: A charming but totally ruthless criminal is sent to a remote Arizona prison. He enlists the help of his cellmates in an escape attempt with the promise of sharing his hidden loot.

programme.title: Grizzly
programme.desc: An eighteen-foot-tall grizzly bear terrorizes a state park, leaving it up to a Park Ranger to save the day.

programme.title: Overlord
programme.desc: With only hours until D-Day, a small team of American paratroopers drop into Nazi-occupied France to carry out a mission that's crucial to the invasion's success.

programme.title: Five Minutes to Live
programme.desc: Selepas rompakan bank mereka berlaku dengan teruk, seorang penjenayah ganas dan pasukannya mengambil isteri pengarah bank sebagai tebusan.

programme.title: Gorgo
programme.desc: The classic sci-fi story of a captured baby prehistoric monster put on display in London, with giant momma monster coming to the rescue! Move over Godzilla, Gorgo is coming!

programme.title: August Creek
programme.desc: A soldier's widow is shocked to experience a spark of attraction to an old friend while paying a return visit to her hometown. Romantic drama, starring Courtney Ford

programme.title: Love & Coffee
programme.desc: When a food scientist is sent to Colombia, she meets the owner of an organic farm while looking for quality ingredients. To gain his trust, she helps him harvest the crops, and a romance brews. TV-PG

programme.title: The First Of The Few
programme.desc: This exclusive film focuses on the unlikely friendship between a British Spitfire ace and one of the Luftwaffe's star pilots. Also includes interviews with German pilots who flew over England in 1940.

programme.title: The Con Artists
programme.desc: During the 1920s in France, con artists Philippe and Fleiss escape from prison and team up to swindle wealthy ex-wife Philippe Belle

programme.title: Mommy Would Never Hurt You

programme.title: Her Deadly Sugar Daddy
programme.desc: An aspiring blogger befriends a wealthy sugar daddy, thinking she's hit the jackpot - only to be ensnared in his dark and dangerous underworld.

programme.title: Mythica: The Godslayer
programme.desc: As the Lich King's zombie legions ravage the world, a cursed young sorceress and her friend Dagen, a self-serving half-elf rogue, embark on a quest to obtain a weapon from the gods.

programme.desc: Viola Vitale, Miss Italy and fashion journalist, returns to Sicily to look for her father. He starts working for a digital news company and teams up with police inspector Francesco Demir to solve crimes with the help of synesthesia.

programme.title: The Wrong Man (VO)
programme.desc: Rich restaurant owner Özgür prefers casual encounters to serious relationships. Ezgi wants to get married, but ends up being used by men. Özgür agrees to give him dating tips so that his next relationship with Serdar will work out.

programme.title: Room 309 (VO)

programme.title: Carrot Cake Murder: A Hannah Swensen Mystery

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Murphy is eager to join the team for a dangerous procedure involving a tumor removal. However, having been removed from the surgical team by Dr. Han, Shaun dedicates himself to helping a child.

programme.title: The Good Doctor

programme.title: dreamy bird

programme.title: The Legacy of the Enchanted Veil
programme.desc: Tracy is the last of the three friends to keep her old wedding veil. Will he also have a magical effect on her, despite her skepticism?

programme.title: Diabolic Pursuit
programme.desc: At the University of Chicago, a cheap method of producing fuel from water is invented. But a fatal explosion destroys all the work and claims one victim.

programme.title: Diabolic Pursuit
programme.desc: A college student finds himself caught up in a web of industrial espionage, government intrigue and murder as he works on a groundbreaking scientific project.

programme.title: Prometo Amar-te
programme.desc: A car accident leaves Paige in a coma. When she wakes up and reveals that she is suffering from total memory loss, Leo, her husband, has no alternative but to commit himself to winning her over. For the second time...

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Dr. Shaun Murphy is eager to be part of the medical team that will perform a very dangerous operation to remove a tumor. However, after being booted from the Surgery team by Dr. Jackson Han (guest star Daniel Dae Kim), Shaun must harness his talents to help diagnose the cause of a child's injuries.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: A bar fight lands Dr. Shaun Murphy in St. Bonaventure's emergency room. Dr. Alex Park and Dr. Audrey Lim disagree about an elderly woman's post-operative symptoms. Meanwhile, Dr. Neil Melendez and Dr. Lim go public with their romance, and Dr. Aaron Glassman continues to pursue a relationship with a good friend.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: Zeynep feels uncomfortable with the closeness between Alihan and her best friend Elif, and begins to suspect that it's not just a friendship.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Can and Sanem spend an afternoon at the beach. Melahat receives an inheritance. Mihriban tells Selim that if he helps her get Aziz back, she will forgive him the money he owes her. Selim learns that Melahat has become a millionaire.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Good Karma Hospital
programme.desc: Heartbroken and disillusioned, young Dr Ruby Walker leaves her life in the UK for a fresh start in exotic south India. But when she arrives at “Good Karma Hospital”, nothing is as she expected, especially her new and eccentric boss Lydia Fonseca.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Vittorio tries to find out who reported Andreina and his suspicions fall squarely on Marta.

programme.title: The Ladies' Paradise
programme.desc: Marta and Vittorio decide to stay apart for a while and Luca Spinelli takes advantage of the situation to invite Marta Guarnieri to leave with him.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Can and Sanem spend an afternoon at the beach. Melahat receives an inheritance. Mihriban tells Selim that if he helps her get Aziz back, she will forgive him the money he owes her. Selim learns that Melahat has become a millionaire.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: A new marriage changes the balance and opens an even more dangerous front. As secrets come to light, tensions rise and a hidden threat puts everyone at risk.

programme.title: Dressed for Wedding
programme.desc: Jane is a romantic and independent woman who has been a bridesmaid 27 times! Her fairy tale seems far from coming true, until her little sister wins the heart of Jane's boss, with whom she is secretly in love.

programme.title: dreamy bird
programme.desc: Mevkibe recommends Melahat not to spend the money. Sanem discovers that Can had planned the day they spent at sea. Emre tells Leyla that playing dirty doesn't bring anything good. Can devises a new campaign to get the ad clean.

programme.title: Purple like the sea
programme.desc: Viola's workplace is in uproar after an unexpected visitor arrives. Demir and Viola investigate a suspicious death in a restaurant's cold storage room. At the same time, Viola tries to organize a trip with Raniero.

programme.title: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: Ezgi gets drunk in Özgür's bar, who can't get rid of her. Dr. Serdar calls Ezgi. Özgür goes through an embarrassing situation with Yesim and suffers the consequences.

programme.title: Mona Lisa's Smile
programme.desc: In 1953, an Art History teacher at a girls' school tries to broaden the strict horizons of her brilliant students.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Following what he believes was a disastrous first date with Carly, Dr. Shaun Muprhy proposes radical surgery to save a newly married woman's life.

programme.title: The Good Doctor
programme.desc: Shaun and his new assistant treat a Samaritan with experimental surgery to reconstruct his jaw. Shaun decides to try to have romantic dates again, but with his conditions. Debbie encourages Glassman to get involved in Shaun's love life.

programme.title: eternal love
programme.desc: Emir begins to suspect Tufan. While Kemal searches for Emir's unknown brother, Fehime discovers that Zeynep has left her husband's house.

programme.title: The Forbidden Fruit
programme.desc: New alliances begin to move key pieces and trigger suspicions. As secrets and manipulations increase, a hidden plan threatens to permanently disrupt the balance.

programme.title: How to Kill Your Husband
programme.desc: Nancy Crampton-Brophy, known for writing about homicides and tumultuous relationships, fantasies about killing or running away from her husband, and even faking her own death, was arrested in 2022 for murdering her husband.

programme.title: On the Edge of 18
programme.desc: Growing up is not easy for some. For Nadine, for example, a student who has to deal with the fact that her best friend is dating her older brother. She feels more alone than ever... Until she meets a young man who gives her all his attention...

programme.title: Mystery at the Florist: A suspicious burial
programme.desc: When a body appears at her cousin's wedding, a former lawyer florist sets out to investigate a crime that hides family secrets and unexpected dangers.

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: Terrorist threat
programme.desc: Ewan, an agent of the British Secret Service, has the mission to capture and eliminate Ash, a university student turned suicide bomber, as well as the cell to which he belongs.

programme.title: run like a girl
programme.desc: The true story of Michelle Payne, the first female jockey to win the Melbourne Cup. An inspiring story of effort, family, friendship and courage in the face of the impossible.

programme.title: hidden figures
programme.desc: As a child, African-American Katherine proved to be a mathematical prodigy. Now, as an adult, she works for NASA... but in the USA of 1961, as a woman and black, her brilliant work means very little.

programme.title: When the river rises
programme.desc: The story takes place in Tennessee. Despite the threat of a rising river and a poor harvest, Tom Garvey and his wife Mae, a young farming couple, are determined to preserve the land of their ancestors. But, burdened by debt, Tom is forced to become a scab during a strike at the local steel mill, leaving his wife to run the farm. Upon their return, they have to face not only the flooding of a furious river that can wash away the work of so many years but also a power-hungry landowner who covets the lands of the Garveys and their neighbors to satisfy his ambition.

programme.title: The client
programme.desc: Mark Sway is an eleven-year-old boy who witnesses the death of a mafia lawyer. Before dying, he confesses some very important information to him. But, fearing retaliation, Mark doesn't dare tell the FBI. The FBI pressures Mark to reveal the lawyer's last words, but he, aware that the mafia is watching him, decides to hire a lawyer to protect him. Adaptation of the best seller of the same name by John Grisham, directed by Joel Schumacher (''A Day of Fury'', ''Batman Forever''). Its plot starting point is vaguely reminiscent of that of ''Sole Witness'', although the Mormon community that surrounded Harrison Ford in Peter Weir's film is replaced here by a single character: that of a devoted lawyer. For this reason, the true core of the film, despite being a thriller, is not the judicial plot, but the relationship established between the boy, played by Brad Renfro (chosen from 5,000 candidates), and his lawyer, a role entrusted to Susan Sarandon, for which she was nominated for an Oscar for best actress. Tommy Lee Jones gave life to the third party, in the shoes of an ambitious prosecutor.

programme.title: Widows
programme.desc: During the escape after committing a robbery, the van in which four thieves intend to escape is shot at by the police and bursts into flames.

programme.title: Son of a Gun
programme.desc: Young JR is accused and imprisoned for a minor crime. When he enters prison he discovers the harshness of life in prison, but he will soon become the protégé of Brendan Lynch, one of the most dangerous prisoners in Australia. However, that protection will have a price and Lynch, along with his team, will have plans for JR when he is released from prison: help them with their escape plan.

programme.title: Platoon
programme.desc: Filmed entirely in the Philippines, "Platoon" tells us about the year a young university student named Chris spends in a regiment, who decides to volunteer for the Vietnam War. First part of a trilogy directed and written by Oliver Stone about the Vietnam War (followed by Born on the Fourth of July and Between Heaven and Earth). The protagonist of this story is a young Charlie Sheen, accompanied by a cast among which we highlight Willem Dafoe, Tom Berenger or some at that time still unknown Forest Whitaker or Johnny Depp. "Platoon" was the first film about Vietnam written and directed by a veteran of that war. Oliver Stone created this masterpiece taken from the experiences that he himself lived on the battlefield in his year as a soldier, filming almost a documentary where he tells us in first person through a character named Chris all his experiences in Vietnam. We are thus witnessing one of the most precise and realistic war films that recount this conflict with excellent direction, a script and impeccable editing. As for the exteriors, they are very well detailed and this perfection makes the viewer quickly immerse themselves in the war atmosphere that surrounds everything without rest. Definitely, a spectacular film that shows what until then Hollywood always tried to hide and the best way to get closer to what those days in Vietnam really were. Classic of the eighties and universal cinema.

programme.title: The debt collector 2
programme.desc: A pair of debt collectors suddenly find themselves involved in a highly dangerous situation in which they try to hunt down several criminals while fleeing from a gangster.

programme.title: Point Break (Sin límites)
programme.desc: Remake of the film 'They Call Him Bodhi', directed in 1991 by Kathryn Bigelow ('The Darkest Night'). Johnny, a young FBI agent, infiltrates a team of elite athletes led by Boshi. Johnny's mission is to discover if the gang is behind a series of deaths and unusual robberies that are causing the world economy to plummet. Therefore, covertly and trying not to discover his true identity, the agent will have to risk his life to find evidence that will allow him to incriminate the gang and capture it. However, when he begins to form a friendship with the leader, Johnny will question whose side he is on and what he should do.

programme.title: They call him Bodhi
programme.desc: The FBI suspects that a group of surfers are responsible for a series of bank robberies, so they send agent Johnny Utah to infiltrate them. Utah manages to gain their trust by participating in the extreme activities they engage in and befriends Bodhi, the group's leader. Utah is becoming more integrated every day and will soon have to decide between his obligations as a member of the FBI and his loyalty to Bodhi.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Running at full speed around the track, doing everything around, over and through the competition. Speed ​​Racer is a born racer, born to drive racing cars. Speed ​​is aggressive, instinctive and, above all, reckless. His only competition is the memory of his brother, his idol, the legendary Rex Racer, whose death in a race has left a goal that Speed ​​feels the need to fulfill. Speed ​​feels a great loyalty to the family racing business run by his father, Pops Racer, the designer of the powerful Mach 5 car he pilots. When Speed ​​rejects a very lucrative and tempting offer from Royalton Industries, he not only angers the company's maniacal owner but also discovers a terrible secret: some of the most important races are being manipulated by a handful of heartless businessmen who manipulate the most important drivers to get more money. If Speed ​​does not drive for Royalton's team, Royalton will ensure that the Mach 5 never crosses the finish line. The only way Speed ​​can save his family's business and the sport he loves is to beat Royalton at its own game. With the support of his family and his loyal girlfriend, Trixie, Speed ​​teams up with his former rival, the mysterious Racer X, to win the race that killed his brother: the death-defying cross-country rally.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish is a boy who accidentally finds a board game called Jumanji and convinces his friend Sarah to try it, but very strange events begin to occur and the game will catch them and change their lives. By throwing the dice, Alan is transported to a parallel world, where he will not be able to leave until the game ends, but circumstances cause Sarah to leave and Alan is trapped for 26 years in that other world until two new children find the game and start playing.

programme.title: Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Two years ago Peter Parker decided to accept his responsibility as Spider-Man and put his personal life aside; within which enter his great love Mary Jane Watson and his friend Harry Osborn, who feels a desire for revenge against Spider-Man for the death of his father. Peter's relationship with both of them is increasingly deteriorating. Peter's friend and role model, Dr. Otto Octavius ​​begins experimenting with fusion energy funded by the current president of Oscorp, who is Harry Osborn. But accidentally, the experiment becomes unstable, so his robotic arms fuse to his spine and he loses control, becoming the villainous Dr. Octopus. Despite this conflict with Octavius, Peter faces the emotional distress caused by knowing that his love Mary Jane is engaged to another man. This makes him think about what his life would be like without having to fight crime, so he will be forced to choose between his personal life as a student and his public obligations. Directed by Sam Raimi, it is the second film in the Marvel superhero saga made by this director, who is also known for his low-budget horror films such as "The Evil Dead" trilogy. He also produced television series such as "Hercules: His Legendary Journeys" or "Xena: Warrior Princess." Tobey Maguire plays Peter Parker in this first Spider-Man trilogy, who made his film debut with "This Boy's Life" and starred in films such as "Pleasantville", "Seabiscuit" and "The Great Gatsby". Kirsten Dunst plays Mary Jane Watson. This actress, model and singer was recognized at the age of 12 for her portrayal of a vampire in "Interview with the Vampire." He also participated in "Jumanji", "The Virgin Suicides" by Sofia Coppola and "Marie Antoinette". James Franco plays Harry Osborn, who began in the series "Freaks & Geeks" and participated in films such as "Milk" or "127 Hours."

programme.title: Demolition
programme.desc: A successful executive struggles to understand his emotional disconnection after the sudden and tragic death of his wife in a car accident. Despite his father-in-law's pressure to recover, Davis remains bewildered and reflects this by compulsively disassembling increasingly conspicuous objects around him.

programme.title: Red hot
programme.desc: Art Jeffries is an FBI agent with respect problems for his superiors. One day he is assigned to investigate the case of a missing boy, Simon, whose parents have been murdered. After finding him, he discovers that he is a nine-year-old autistic boy with a prodigious ability to reveal supposedly insurmountable government codes.

programme.title: Terrorist threat
programme.desc: Ewan, an agent of the British Secret Service, has the mission to capture and eliminate Ash, a university student turned suicide bomber, as well as the cell to which he belongs.

programme.title: The Kaiser's Last Kiss
programme.desc: A German officer is sent to Holland to determine whether the British Secret Service has infiltrated the home of Kaiser Wilhelm II, during the start of World War II, but begins a dangerous and lethal romance with a young Dutch Jew with consequences neither of them could have foreseen.

programme.title: Night of Vengeance
programme.desc: Vincent is a divorced man with a teenage son, Thomas, with whom he barely has a relationship. He works as a police officer in Los Angeles, dealing with corrupt matters hidden from Internal Affairs. After a heist in which he steals a shipment of cocaine from a dealer in Las Vegas, Vincent and his partner Sean Cass volunteer to investigate the case in order to hide their guilt and involvement from Internal Affairs. One afternoon when Vincent is walking with his son, the group of criminals from whom he stole cocaine corners him and kidnaps Thomas, threatening to end his life if he does not return the drugs. The leaders of Internal Affairs suspect Vincent and decide to investigate him. He only has one night to get his son back safe and sound, return the drug shipment, hide the truth from his ex-partner and cleanse his image in front of the heads of Internal Affairs.

programme.title: The beginner
programme.desc: After the murder of his partner, Agent Pulovski (Clint Eastwood), a veteran police officer with a bad temper, will begin working with rookie Ackerman (Charlie Sheen), a young man with emotional problems who is beginning to learn about the profession. Pulovski will try to apprehend the murderers of his former partner, a powerful organization dedicated to the theft and resale of luxury cars. Despite the initial conflicts, both must be understood to locate the brain of the organization.

programme.title: The big shark (Jaws 3)
programme.desc: Third sequel born as a result of Spielberg's famous film "Jaws". When a baby white shark ends up trapped in a water park, the owner decides to use it as a lure to attract more customers. What is not expected is that the mother, an adult shark measuring more than 35 feet, will go looking for him and begins to kill bathers indiscriminately. Mike Brody, the adult son of Police Captain Brody, who killed a killer shark ten years ago, will try to take down the terrifying beast.

programme.title: The agent
programme.desc: In the year 2030, the world is in a permanent state of economic recession and faces serious environmental problems as a result of global warming. All those citizens who are unproductive are exiled to a colony.

programme.title: elite mercenaries
programme.desc: Billionaire technology CEO Donovan Chalmers hires a group of deadly mercenaries to protect a piece of technology that, if exposed, could destroy the world. Their mission becomes even more risky when Chalmers' daughter is kidnapped by the dangerous terrorist group 'The Pardoners', who will stop at nothing to obtain the valuable and dangerous technology.

programme.title: the wanted
programme.desc: A mysterious killer kills the wife of Dr. Kimble, a prominent surgeon who is now accused of murder. During his transfer to prison he manages to escape but now he must prove his innocence.

programme.title: This house is a ruin
programme.desc: Anna (Shelley Long) is a young and attractive violinist who stays for a few days with her boyfriend, the lawyer Walter Fielding (Tom Hanks), in the luxurious apartment of her ex-husband, the great conductor Max Beissart (Alexander Godunov). They are happy, but they want to be even more so. Walter's formula is very simple, happiness is in a little house on the outskirts of New York with its white fence, a dog, two children and a little woman. But, at least for the moment, Anna's intentions do not involve marriage. However, the urgent need to look for a house is imposed when her ex-husband returns suddenly and needs to reoccupy her apartment. Walter turns to his friend Jack (Josh Mostel), a real estate agent, who provides him with a real bargain a few kilometers from New York, a dream house for very little money. After managing to raise the money, the couple buys the house from Estelle, its quirky owner (Maureen Stapleton). But unfortunately, mishaps begin to happen in this fabulous mansion: doorbells burn, the bed sinks, the door falls, steps break, ceilings fall apart, pipes shake and, as the final number, the staircase shatters. But since they still really like the house, with the best of their will they set out to fix the mess. They turn to the service of the unique Shirk brothers, Art (Joe Mantegna), the carpenter, and Brad (Carmine Caridi), the plumber.

programme.title: Together and mixed up
programme.desc: Jim and Lauren have a disastrous blind date and decide not to see each other again. Together with their respective children, the unique couple separately books an idyllic vacation at a luxurious resort dedicated to safaris in Africa. Without knowing they were going to meet, Lauren and Jim end up spending more time together than they imagined.

programme.title: Happiness never comes alone
programme.desc: Sacha is a true seducer who loves to go out, he ignores alarm clocks, engagement rings and taxes. Charlotte is a modern, independent woman who has three children, two ex-husbands, and runs a contemporary art foundation. There is no place for romance in his life. Although they are polar opposites, when they meet, they discover that they are made for each other.

programme.title: Speed Racer
programme.desc: Running at full speed around the track, doing everything around, over and through the competition. Speed ​​Racer is a born racer, born to drive racing cars. Speed ​​is aggressive, instinctive and, above all, reckless. His only competition is the memory of his brother, his idol, the legendary Rex Racer, whose death in a race has left a goal that Speed ​​feels the need to fulfill. Speed ​​feels a great loyalty to the family racing business run by his father, Pops Racer, the designer of the powerful Mach 5 car he pilots. When Speed ​​rejects a very lucrative and tempting offer from Royalton Industries, he not only angers the company's maniacal owner but also discovers a terrible secret: some of the most important races are being manipulated by a handful of heartless businessmen who manipulate the most important drivers to get more money. If Speed ​​does not drive for Royalton's team, Royalton will ensure that the Mach 5 never crosses the finish line. The only way Speed ​​can save his family's business and the sport he loves is to beat Royalton at its own game. With the support of his family and his loyal girlfriend, Trixie, Speed ​​teams up with his former rival, the mysterious Racer X, to win the race that killed his brother: the death-defying cross-country rally.

programme.title: Jumanji
programme.desc: Alan Parrish is a boy who accidentally finds a board game called Jumanji and convinces his friend Sarah to try it, but very strange events begin to occur and the game will catch them and change their lives. By throwing the dice, Alan is transported to a parallel world, where he will not be able to leave until the game ends, but circumstances cause Sarah to leave and Alan is trapped for 26 years in that other world until two new children find the game and start playing.

programme.title: my sister's husband
programme.desc: Richard is a Cambridge professor who will find himself involved in an unexpected love triangle. After getting a young and attractive American student pregnant, he will also meet her sister, an eccentric novelist.

programme.title: 2 Guns
programme.desc: Robert Trench, an undercover DEA agent, takes advantage of gunman Michael Stigman's idea of ​​robbing a bank to get a mob boss out. However, the plan turns out to be exceedingly satisfactory when they get much more money than anticipated and, in addition, Trench's forces do not block their exit. To complicate things a little more. Stigman turns out to be a Navy Intelligence agent who shoots Trench and takes all the money. Soon, a confusing loop will begin in which both forces of the American army will pursue both Trench and Sitgman in a corrupt and dirty plot to each keep the profits. And without anyone expecting it, both Trench and Sitgman discover that they have to work together to be able to survive their own bosses and assault groups and to finally emerge victorious. During the development of the film, Vince Vaughn was going to play Bobby and Owen Wilson was going to play Stig. Also, as a curiosity, in the film's trailer you can hear the song "Die by the drop" from 2010 by the band The Dead Weathers. This song had previously been used in the trailer for Contraband (2012), which also featured Mark Wahlberg and was directed by Baltasar Kormákur.

programme.title: Space Cowboys
programme.desc: When a Russian satellite in orbit around Earth threatens to fall onto the planet, NASA looks to the engineer who designed it to fix it before it enters the atmosphere. Frank Colvin, a former Air Force pilot, was the one who designed the device forty years ago. He was about to travel to space but they finally decided to do without him, truncating all his dreams of being an astronaut. Reluctantly, Frank accepts the mission to travel to space, but on the condition that his team, the one from forty years ago, accompany him on the mission. After some grueling tests, Frank Colvin, Tank Sullica, Jerry O'Neil and Haw Hawkins travel into space to fix the satellite. But when they reach the point where they must carry out their mission, they encounter some more difficult problems than expected. In the film, the four astronauts appear together on 'The Tonight Show with Jay Leno.' To promote the film, the four actors also went to this program. NASA offered the production its 'vomit comet' plane, used to create the state of weightlessness. Clint Eastwood rejected the offer for fear that the elderly actors would become too ill to work. The four actors pretend to be the same age in the film, seventy years old. In reality, the youngest is Tommy Lee Jones, who at the time of filming was only fifty-four years old.

programme.title: Shark, revenge
programme.desc: Years pass and Ellen Brody continues to live in Amyty. Her sons, Sean and Micahel, no longer work at Sea World and her husband passed away some time ago due to cardiac arrest. Currently, Sean is the city's police officer. On Christmas night, he receives the order to go to the beach to unscrew a log from a buoy. In the process he is eaten by a great white shark. Convinced that the sharks have some kind of vendetta against her family, Ellen travels with Michael, his wife and daughter to a house they have in the Bahamas. What Ellen and her family don't know is that the threat has followed them there. The film's main tagline, 'This time it's personal', was parodied in 'Back to the Future II'. In the film you can see a poster for the fictional 'Jaws 19', directed by Max Spielberg and whose slogan is 'This time it's very personal.' This phrase has ended up becoming a cliché in movies with many sequels. Actor Michael Caine could not attend the Oscars and collect his award for 'Hannah and Her Sisters', because he was filming this film at that time. The water in the tank in which the film's climax was shot was filled with blue dye, so Micahel Caine and Lorraine Gary ended up with their hair completely dyed this color. Lorraine Gary was nominated for Best Actress at the United States Academy Awards for Science Fiction, Fantasy and Horror.

programme.title: Adoptive parents
programme.desc: Coline and André are in perfect harmony with their daughter, Garance, and their son-in-law Harold. But Garance separates from Harold and orders his parents to never see him again, the in-laws cannot do it. They will have to lead a double life to continue seeing their beloved son-in-law.

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Manhattan, New York. After almost thirty years without hearing from them, the ghosts and demons have once again escaped from the underworld to destroy the city. This time a new team of Ghostbusters, made up of a group of four women, is ready to put an end to any spectral threat.

programme.title: force team
programme.desc: With the American football league very advanced and the possibility of reaching the finals, the Washington Sentinels players decide to go on strike. To solve such a delicate situation, the team owner hires legendary coach Jimmy McGinty and proposes an almost impossible challenge: recruit a team of substitutes in one week. Once the first step is taken, you will have to face an even more difficult mission; coach this peculiar group of unknown and somewhat "losing" players, led by Shane Falco.

programme.title: Tech Now
programme.desc: Harriet Bradshaw finds out how AI is being used to help solve an art history mystery. Nick Kwek visits the University of Texas to explore new innovations in hydrogen car technology. programme.title: AI Decoded
programme.desc: The FIFA 2026 World Cup will be the biggest ever - spanning three countries, 48 teams, 104 matches, and an audience of billions. Now, for the first time, artificial intelligence will sit at the heart of the tournament. From sharper offside decisions to real-time digital replicas of all 16 stadiums, organisers will use AI to monitor crowds, improve safety, and manage the event from a single command centre. For fans, both in the stadium and at home, it promises an entirely new way to experience the game. So will more AI really improve the game? Or risk taking something away from it? Join AI Decoded as we explore whether technology can truly enhance football - and what fans actually want from the future of the sport.

programme.title: The Media Show
programme.desc: A new Netflix documentary follows the final stage of Rafael Nadal's tennis career. The series is the latest high-profile sports documentary made for a streaming platform. Zachary Heinzerling, director of Rafa, outlines how the film was made and the level of access his team received. Minal Modha, senior research director at Ampere Analysis, provides context on the growing business of sports documentaries. In Scotland, Peter Murrell's guilty plea to embezzling funds from the SNP has renewed attention on the reporting that first raised questions about the affair. John Ferguson, political editor at the Sunday Mail, reflects on his own journalism. Laura Kuenssberg explains how she secured the first broadcast interview with Nicola Sturgeon since her estranged husband's conviction. CBS News is facing upheaval following changes in leadership and the departure of several senior figures. The latest developments centre on the dismissal of veteran correspondent Scott Pelley after public criticism of the network's direction. Michael Grynbaum, media correspondent at The New York Times, outlines the story.

Jodoh Di Ujung Jari
programme.desc: Rio, cowok tampan playboy kampus, banyak cewek-cewek terpikat oleh Rio. Rio punya empat pacar dan harus bisa mengatur waktu dengan keempat pacarnya. Apakah akan berjalan dengan mulus?

programme.title: Pliss Gue Bukan Princess
programme.desc: Genta mengenalkan Alila, pacarnya, ke ibunya. Namun, Alila dianggap kurang feminin, sehingga ibu Genta memberi waktu agar Alila bisa berubah.

programme.title: Cinta Dalam Dompet
programme.desc: Tak ingin diledek jomblo terus, Kinan berpura-pura menjadi pacar Reno yang tajir, namun Reno hanya memanfaatkan Kinan saja. Ternyata Reno tidak setajir yang Kinan kira.

programme.title: Putri Salju Van Betawi
programme.desc: Puteri, gadis yang dibuang dan akan dibunuh oleh Ibu tirinya sendiri. Dia akhirnya ditemukan dan dibesarkan oleh seorang jawara betawi yang melatihnya menjadi seorang gadis pesilat handal yang akan menghadapi sang Ibu tiri.

programme.title: Bangkitnya Rawa Rontek
programme.desc: Rontek, seorang pendekar jahat yang menguasai ilmu hitam bernama 'rawa rontek' yang bisa menjadikannya kebal. Suatu ketika Rontek harus menghadapi lawan tangguh yang memiliki ilmu 'pancasona'.

programme.title: Silat Boy The Series 4
programme.desc: Untuk keempat kalinya Indonesia kalah dari Malaysia di Kejuaraan Asia Tenggara. Mada, Ken dan Mpok Yagi berusaha mendaftarkan tim Indonesia untuk pertandingan berikutnya. Namun, mereka harus mencari lima anggota.

programme.title: Salon Madam : Rambut Api
programme.desc: Seorang wanita datang ke Salon Madam untuk mengecat rambutnya dan mempercantik penampilannya, tapi cantik itu luka, dan rambutnya bisa menjadi petaka membara jika tak digunakan dengan bijak.

programme.title: Jodoh Di Ujung Jari
programme.desc: Rio, cowok tampan playboy kampus, banyak cewek-cewek terpikat oleh Rio. Rio punya empat pacar dan harus bisa mengatur waktu dengan keempat pacarnya. Apakah akan berjalan dengan mulus?

programme.title: Pejantan Tanggung 02
programme.desc: Akhirnya keempat sahabat ini kembali bersatu dan melupakan kejadian di masa lalu. Ketika mereka saling terbuka tentang perasaan mereka, persahabatan mereka pun dipertaruhkan.

programme.title: Ku Tambal Hatimu Dengan Cinta
programme.desc: Olin, gadis tomboy yang berniat bekerja di Jakarta setelah lulus SMA. Dia bertemu Ucok dan bekerja di bengkel miliknya. Tapi Bams membeli lapaknya, dan Ucok diusir. Peristiwa itu membuat Olin bermusuhan dengan Bams.

programme.title: Kalau Cinta Jangan Muna
programme.desc: Tito dan Erin sudah menjalin hubungan selama lima tahun. Erin ingin merayakan anniversary, namun tiba-tiba Tito memutuskan hubungan begitu saja tanpa alasan yang jelas. Keadaan berubah ketika Erin mengalami kecelakaan dan amnesia

programme.title: Kr. Amat Tikar Rogosukmo Shop
programme.desc: Tikar Rogo Sukmo adalah selembar tikar yang bisa menyembuhkan orang sakit. Tikar ini bukanlah tikar sembarangan. Setiap orang yang sembuh setelah memakainya akan langsung dengan sukarela memberikan seluruh hartanya.

programme.title: Sunan Ampel Dan Kebun Singkong Emas
programme.desc: Sunan Ampel datang ke desa Kembang Kuning. Untuk meredakan perseteruan Ki Bangkuning dan Ki Wiryo atas sebidang tanah, dia menanam singkong di tanah tersebut, dan setelah dipanen singkong tersebut ternyata menghasilkan emas.

programme.title: Sudah Jatuh Tertimpa Cinta
programme.desc: Abi, anak orang kaya baru lulus kuliah. Abi berpikir akan memegang perusahaan ayahnya. Tapi, ayahnya ingin Abi mandiri dan tidak bergantung dengan orang tua. Abi diusir dari rumah dan diputusin pacarnya karena tidak punya apa-apa

programme.title: Kesengsem Tukang Sedot WC
programme.desc: Dika, seorang tukang sedot WC yang tampan, yang terlibat masalah dengan atasan barunya, anak perempuan pemilik perusahaan yang ditugaskan untuk menyelidiki dugaan penyelewengan dana perusahaan.

programme.title: Married Failed
programme.desc: Jack, pencuri yang sedang menjadi buron. Suatu ketika ia merampok sebuah rumah dan mengambil satu peti mewah. Ia mengira itu adalah peti yang memuat perhiasan serta uang banyak, namun ternyata isinya benar-benar di luar dugaan.

programme.title: Mysterious Girlfriend
programme.desc: Olive adalah cewek kutu buku yang tidak mempunyai teman. Anehnya, dia punya pengagum rahasia bernama Gary yang selalu mengiriminya surat. Namun, tidak ada yang bisa melihat Gary!

programme.title: Mysterious Girlfriend
programme.desc: Olive adalah cewek kutu buku yang tidak mempunyai teman. Anehnya, dia punya pengagum rahasia bernama Gary yang selalu mengiriminya surat. Namun, tidak ada yang bisa melihat Gary!

programme.title: The Shadow Boxer
programme.desc: Petinju Tai Chi nan hebat, Ku Ting, menyembunyikan keahliannya dengan bekerja sebagai pekerja konstruksi. Namun, saat para preman menyerang kekasihnya, ia akhirnya menggunakan kung fu guna mengalahkan musuh-musuhnya.

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: Penyanyi Qing Qing dan arsitek Tang Peng Nan adalah pasangan serasi. Ia mengorbankan dirinya untuk membantu Peng Nan pada saat keluarganya mengalami kesulitan. Namun, mereka putus karena kesalahpahaman.

programme.title: Roving Swordsman
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat nan ambisius berniat untuk menguasai dunia seni bela diri. Untuk mencapai tujuan tersebut, mereka harus mencuri manuskrip seni bela diri rahasia yang menggambarkan cara membuat senjata api.

programme.title: Tragic Commitment
programme.desc: Selama lima tahun, Alex menjalani pernikahan bahagia dengan istrinya Tung, seorang ginekolog. Saat Alex terluka parah dalam sebuah kecelakaan, ia merasa harus memberitahu Tung tentang perselingkuhannya dengan Blackie.

programme.title: Gambler's Delight
programme.desc: Dalam film tentang perjudian ini, Danny Lee berperan sebagai seorang penjudi putus asa yang melakukan kecurangan saat berjudi di sebuah kasino di Makau. Ia pun harus menghadapi seorang pemimpin geng asal Jepang.

programme.title: Love Without End
programme.desc: Penyanyi Qing Qing dan arsitek Tang Peng Nan adalah pasangan serasi. Ia mengorbankan dirinya untuk membantu Peng Nan pada saat keluarganya mengalami kesulitan. Namun, mereka putus karena kesalahpahaman.

programme.title: Iron Bodyguard
programme.desc: Wang Wu, seorang kepala perusahaan keamanan Iron Bodyguard, bertemu dengan seorang murid yang merupakan anggota Reformis, kelompok sarjana yang mendesak reformasi sosial di Tiongkok pada akhir dinasti Qing.

programme.title: The Blue And The Black, Pt 2
The Flying Dagger
programme.desc: Keluarga Yu dan klan Naga Hijau bermusuhan saat putri dari keluarga Yu membunuh putra kepala klan yang merupakan pemerkosa dan pembunuh. Pemimpin klan Naga Hijau melukai kepala keluarga Yu dengan belati terbangnya.

programme.title: The Delinquent
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan kisah tentang para remaja miskin di Hong Kong pada tahun 1960-an. Wang berperan sebagai tokoh utama, seorang remaja pemarah dan pemberontak yang terpikat pada sisi gelap kehidupan.

programme.title: Rolls, Rolls, I Love You
programme.desc: Tiga pemuda menyinggung seorang miliarder dan terlibat dalam taruhan yang tinggi. Jika menang, mereka bisa memiliki mobil Rolls Royce miliknya, tetapi mereka harus membayar lima puluh ribu dolar jika kalah!

programme.title: Facets Of Love
programme.desc: Berlatar pada era Dinasti Ming, film ini mengisahkan gadis-gadis yang bekerja di suatu rumah bordil, termasuk seorang gadis dari keluarga miskin yang dijual oleh ibunya dan berharap dapat mengubah nasibnya.

programme.title: Finger Of Doom
programme.desc: Misteri, horor dan seni bela diri bergabung dalam kisah supranatural tentang mantan pendekar pedang yang kini menjadi pembuat payung. Mereka harus menghadapi sosok jahat yang berpengaruh serta memiliki jari-jari ajaib.

programme.title: Killer Darts
programme.desc: Sekawanan bandit brutal memperkosa dan menjarah di desa-desa Tiongkok. Liu Wen, ahli panah yang tengah berduka, beraksi bersama murid, anak, dan pelayannya guna membalas kematian istrinya dan mengembalikan kedamaian.

programme.title: Big Times For Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Sekelompok pemuda dusun yang kocak kembali untuk ke-tiga kalinya! Ah Niu sedang mengerjakan urusannya saat sekantong berlian jatuh dari langit, dan kejadian ini hanyalah awal dari serangkaian kesialan!

programme.title: Big Times For Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Sekelompok pemuda dusun yang kocak kembali untuk ke-tiga kalinya! Ah Niu sedang mengerjakan urusannya saat sekantong berlian jatuh dari langit, dan kejadian ini hanyalah awal dari serangkaian kesialan!

programme.title: Five Tough Guys
programme.desc: Sekelompok orang nan kikuk berkumpul untuk melindungi seorang jenderal patriotik dari orang yang berencana merebut kekuasaan. Mereka menjadi pengawalnya dalam perjalanan berbahaya ke konsulat Inggris.

programme.title: The Casino
programme.desc: Setelah terpisah selama beberapa tahun, pasangan kekasih Lily Ho dan Yueh Hua bertemu di sebuah kasino dan mereka bersumpah untuk menghancurkan para jenderal militer korup, penjahat dan pemeras!

programme.title: Gossip Street
programme.desc: Bintang-bintang Shaw Brothers dan TVB bersatu untuk film epik karya Wang Feng ini. Masalah muncul ketika seorang gangster berencana untuk mengubah tempat favorit penduduk Gossip Street menjadi sebuah sarang perjudian.

programme.title: The Black Lizard
programme.desc: Pendekar pedang Lung Fei menemukan tanda-tanda aneh yang meramalkan kematian tunangannya. Dengan bantuan Kepala Polisi Tieh Hu, ia melakukan penyelidikan dan mengungkap sebuah kisah yang mencengangkan.

programme.title: The Enchanting Ghost
programme.desc: Saat seorang pemuda dan kekasihnya terpisah selamanya akibat ulah sang paman dan temannya, gadis itu pun terdorong untuk bunuh diri. Namun, arwah sang gadis muncul kembali untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Return Of The Crazy Bumpkins
programme.desc: Film sekuel ini bercerita tentang imigran Yeh Feng yang kabur dari penjara untuk tinggal bersama paman Wang Sha yang jahat. Namun, ternyata kekasihnya, Ai Ti, telah menikah dengan seorang pria yang kasar.

programme.title: The Battle Wizard
programme.desc: Pangeran Dali yang bernama Tuan Yu memutuskan untuk meninggalkan istana demi mempelajari dunia seni bela diri. Lalu, ia bertemu dengan sesosok penyihir ular dan saudara tirinya yang misterius.

programme.title: The Human Goddess
programme.desc: Kisah cinta antara sesosok peri nan memikat yang turun dari surga untuk menjalani kehidupan di Hong Kong pada tahun 70-an dengan seorang pria yang mengelola sebuah panti asuhan yang terlilit hutang.

programme.title: The Eunuch
programme.desc: Sebelum menyutradari Bruce Lee dalam film Fist Of Fury, Lo Wei telah menulis dan membintangi film yang mengisahkan seorang pengkhianat yang rela membunuh Kaisar demi merebut kekuasaan tertinggi ini.

programme.title: The Mermaid
programme.desc: Zhang dan putri Jin yang bernama Peony sudah bertunangan sejak lahir, tetapi Jin menolak pertunangan tersebut. Kemudian, Zhang bertemu dengan sesosok roh yang terlihat persis seperti Peony dan mereka jatuh cinta.

programme.title: The Brave Archer
programme.desc: Guo Jing bertemu Huang Rong dan mereka jatuh cinta. Di saat yang sama, Ouyang Ke melamar Huang Rong, sehingga ayah Huang mengatur sebuah duel untuk kedua pria tersebut.

programme.title: The Happy Trio
programme.desc: Li Ching aktris terbaik di era nya berperan sebagai Ah Chiao adalah seorang gadis dari desa yang tersesat di kota, yang berteman dengan seorang pemondok yang baik hati dan seorang mantan aktor.

programme.title: Pursuit Of Vengeance
programme.desc: Legenda Kung Fu Ti Lung membintangi film laga ini sebagai Fu Xue Hong, yang memulai perjalanan agar dapat membalas dendam untuk ayahnya.

programme.title: The Adulteress
programme.desc: Pada masa kemunduran Dinasti Ching, putra dari hakim lokal membunuh seorang pedagang keliling dan memperkosa istrinya. Sang istri dijebak atas pembunuhan suaminya oleh sang pemerkosa.

programme.title: Wits Of The Brats
programme.desc: Tou Kuan adalah seorang pemuda cerdas dari keluarga berada. Ia telah mengalahkan semua penduduk di kotanya dan memutuskan untuk menaklukkan Tiga Pemuda Cerdas dari Utara.

programme.title: West Chamber
programme.desc: Kisah yang diangkat berdasarkan sebuah opera Tiongkok nan terkenal ini menceritakan seorang sarjana muda nan miskin bernama Zhang yang terpesona oleh Hong, putri dari keluarga berpengaruh yang ia temui di sebuah kuil.

programme.title: All Men Are Brothers
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah patriotik tentang tujuh prajurit dalam kelompok penjahat 108 di Gunung Liang, serta tujuh pertempuran nan luar biasa melawan pejabat pemerintah yang kejam demi menyelamatkan negara mereka.

programme.title: Sons Of Good Earth
programme.desc: Film peraih penghargaan untuk naskah dan penyuntingan terbaik ini menceritakan kisah lain dari Perang Tiongkok-Jepang yang menggambarkan dengan jelas kehidupan masa perang secara artistik dan emosional.

programme.title: Brave Archer And His Mate
programme.desc: Guo Jing dan Huang Rong mengasuh putra saudara angkatnya Yang Kang dan memberinya nama Yang Gou. Demi mencegah Yan Gou membalas dendam atas kematian ayahnya, Huang Rong melarangnya mempelajari seni bela diri.

programme.title: Judgement Of An Assassin
programme.desc: Sebuah klan jahat merencanakan perselisihan untuk mendominasi dunia seni bela diri. Pembunuh bertopeng mereka membantai klan-klan lain dan salah satu pembunuh ditangkap dan diadili di pengadilan antarklan.

programme.title: Hong Kong 73
programme.desc: Di tahun 1973, bursa saham meroket, namun masalah-masalah sosial di Hong Kong terus memburuk. Bintang-bintang besar TVB dan Shaw Brothers bersatu dalam kisah yang lucu ini.

programme.title: Murderer Pursues
programme.desc: Danny Lee berperan sebagai pria yang dikira sebagai pengungsi dan dibuntuti oleh seorang polisi jujur dalam film kejahatan menarik asal Tiongkok-Vietnam arahan aktor yang kini menjadi sutradara, Wang Chung.

programme.title: Hex
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang sakit parah bekerjasama dengan asisten rumah tangganya untuk membunuh sang suami yang kasar. Namun, hal ini menyebabkan serangkaian kejadian mengerikan.

programme.title: Raw Passions
programme.desc: Seorang istri yang setia menguak sebuah jaringan pemerasan dan penipuan setelah suaminya ditipu oleh seorang penari perut yang licik. Saat sang penari ditikam, keadaan pun menjadi semakin tak terkendali.

programme.title: Young Lovers
programme.desc: Seorang anak dari keluarga kaya yang gemar bermain gitar bernama Yang Fan pergi ke Jepang untuk bergabung dengan sebuah band rock. Ia juga berusaha mendapatkan cinta dari dua gadis cantik.

programme.title: Lady General Hua Mu-Lan
programme.desc: Kisah legendaris yang bercerita tentang keberanian dan kepahlawanan ini dibintangi oleh Ivy Ling Po yang berperan sebagai Mulan, gadis yang bergabung dengan tentara dan menjadi pahlawan sejati bagi warga Tiongkok.

programme.title: Let's Have A Baby
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah menarik tentang kerumitan dalam menciptakan anak, yang menampilkan penampilan komedi langka oleh Alex Man Chi Leung.

programme.title: Bangkok Storm
programme.desc: Petinju dunia kriminal, Lin Feng, diburu oleh triad asal Bangkok kala ia menolak bertarung dalam sebuah pertandingan ilegal. Lin Feng berhasil melarikan diri, tetapi ia kehilangan ingatannya.

programme.title: Song Of The Assassins
programme.desc: Seorang pembunuh mengemban misi pertamanya sambil diam-diam menyelidiki penyebab pembantaian keluarganya beberapa tahun silam. Namun, ia malah terjerat dalam suatu konspirasi politik saat menjalankan misi.

programme.title: The Fate Of Reunion
programme.desc: Siluman Ular Hijau memperoleh pencerahan di bawah bimbingan Dao Qing dan perlahan jatuh cinta padanya. Namun, pengabdiannya pada Dao Qing membuatnya bereinkarnasi dan mengalami rasa sakit akibat kematian.

programme.title: The Story Of My Son
programme.desc: Li Tsu-liang is newly widowed and leading an impoverished life with two young sons. He attempts to make a fortune at the horse-racing track, but is subsequently entangled with the loan sharks.

programme.title: Faithfully Yours
programme.desc: Sahabat baik Bodil dan Isabel, yang tampaknya telah menikah dengan bahagia, menyelinap pergi untuk melakukan perselingkuhan rahasia dengan menggunakan satu sama lain sebagai alibi. Namun, ketika Isabel terbunuh saat mereka seharusnya bersama. Bodil terjebak dalam jaringan kebohongannya sendiri.

programme.title: Destiny's Champion
programme.desc: Sun Chung dan Ti Lung bersatu kembali untuk sebuah kisah menegangkan tentang seorang pendekar tua yang berusaha menebus kesalahannya di masa lalu melalui seorang anak jalanan yang bijaksana.

programme.title: The Mighty Peking Man
programme.desc: Seorang pengusaha serakah dari Hong Kong menyewa seorang pemburu muda untuk menangkap gorila raksasa yang konon hidup jauh di dalam hutan India. Pemburu itu menemukan kera tersebut, dan hidup bersamanya ia menemukan seorang wanita liar yang telah berteman dengan makhluk itu.

programme.title: Fist Of Legend
programme.desc: Saat belajar di Jepang, Chen Zhen menemukan beberapa pelajar asal Tiongkok menghilang dan tanpa sengaja mengungkap sejumlah konspirasi kelompok Naga Hitam.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Seorang aktor berusaha meyakinkan sesosok wanita untuk berperan sebagai Samantha dalam film Bewitched yang dibuat ulang. Namun, ia tidak menyadari bila wanita itu ternyata benar-benar seorang penyihir!

programme.title: Sex Beyond The Grave
programme.desc: Seorang wanita diperkosa dan dibunuh selama Perang Dunia II. Empat puluh tahun kemudian, ia kembali untuk menghantui para penganiayanya dari Rumah Besar Tao Tao. Seorang profesor dan keluarganya pindah ke rumah itu, hanya untuk kemudian roh-roh tersebut mengambil putra mereka.

programme.title: Fierce Cop
programme.desc: Demi menolong putranya yang diculik oleh jaringan perdagangan manusia, petugas polisi Zhang bekerja sama dengan seorang wanita misterius guna memecahkan sindikat kejahatan internasional dan menyelamatkan putranya.

programme.title: Open The Coffin
programme.desc: Sebuah film misteri supranatural dengan seorang detektif yang menyelidiki pembunuhan yang tampaknya merupakan akibat dari kutukan.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri miskin, Shui dan Ti, berusaha membangun kehidupan mereka sendiri. Dan melalui kerja keras mereka berdua, Shui menjadi seorang eksekutif pemasaran, kemudian sikapnya mulai berubah.

programme.title: Love Is Love
programme.desc: Sepasang suami istri miskin, Shui dan Ti, berusaha membangun kehidupan mereka sendiri. Dan melalui kerja keras mereka berdua, Shui menjadi seorang eksekutif pemasaran, kemudian sikapnya mulai berubah.

programme.title: Nezha
programme.desc: Seorang mantan pembalap ingin membuktikan kelihaiannya dalam sebuah balapan, tapi ia malah melukai rekan setimnya, Lily. Dapatkah tim mereka kembali berjaya kala seorang juara balap mobil virtual bergabung di tim?

programme.title: From Beijing With Love
programme.desc: Seorang mata-mata Tiongkok yang telah pensiun selama sepuluh tahun dan mencari nafkah sebagai tukang daging dikirim ke Hong Kong untuk menemukan tengkorak Tyrannosaurus rex yang dicuri.

programme.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
programme.desc: Seorang prajurit muda Tiongkok mencuri pedang dari seorang pendekar pedang terkenal dan kemudian melarikan diri ke dunia petualangan romantis bersama seorang pria misterius di perbatasan negara.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Saat seorang pria meninggalkan istri dan putrinya, serangkaian percakapan singkat, gerakan yang diamati, pertemuan tak sengaja, dan tindakan impulsif, menceritakan kisah hubungan yang gagal dan berkembang setelah keputusan ini.

programme.title: Iceman: The Time Traveler
programme.desc: Pengawal kekaisaran dan ketiga teman masa kecilnya yang berkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: Mr. Virgin
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pemuda mengabaikan peringatan seorang ahli feng shui dan memutuskan untuk menikah sebelum berusia 30 tahun, serangkaian kesialan mulai mengutuk hidupnya.

programme.title: Ip Man 2
programme.desc: Berfokus pada migrasi Ip Man ke Hong Kong pada tahun 1949 saat ia berupaya menyebarkan disiplin ilmu bela diri Wing Chun yang dianutnya.

programme.title: The Illegal Immigrant
programme.desc: Film ini bercerita tentang seorang imigran gelap asal Tiongkok, Cheung Kwan-chow, dan perjalanannya di New York.

programme.title: Lost Memories
programme.desc: Sebuah upaya pembunuhan yang gagal di Harbin, Cina pada tahun 1909 mengubah arah sejarah. Kini dua agen JBI harus menemukan hubungan antara benda tersebut dengan sebuah artefak Korea kuno.

programme.title: Chinese Odyssey: Cinderella
programme.desc: Kelanjutan yang berbelit-belit dari petualangan Raja Kera yang kini menjadi manusia dan melakukan perjalanan waktu, yang berupaya memenuhi takdir ilahinya.

programme.title: Young Ip Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Seluruh sekolah disandera saat kompetisi pidato bahasa Inggris berlangsung. Ip Man pun memutuskan untuk bangkit dan menghadapi krisis, serta menemukan bahwa dalangnya adalah sang guru dan teman masa kecilnya.

programme.title: Green Wood Robbery
programme.desc: Berlatar belakang tahun-tahun awal Republik Tiongkok, keluarga Kang yang kaya dibunuh secara brutal, dan putri kecil mereka satu-satunya saksi menghilang secara misterius.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: Neng adalah seorang petarung jalanan yang memutuskan untuk hidup di Kowloon Walled City. Ia terlibat dalam perkelahian dan konspirasi. Saat temannya diburu oleh geng triad, Neng harus menyelamatkan temannya.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: Seorang pria tunanetra, You Ji Ren, bekerja di sebuah pabrik di pulau terpencil. Karena badai, pabrik itu terisolasi dan muncul sesosok monster yang membuat siapa pun berubah menjadi bayangan hitam jika melihatnya.

programme.title: Young Heroes Of Chaotic Times
programme.desc: Kisah ini berlatar di Shanghai pada akhir masa Dinasti Qing, dan bercerita tentang seorang pemuda bernama Chen Zhen yang menjadi seorang pahlawan nasional usai menanggung kesulitan dan mengatasi tantangan dalam hidup.

programme.title: The Sorcerer & The White Snake
programme.desc: Seorang biksu ulung berusaha melindungi seorang dokter muda yang naif dari iblis ular berusia seribu tahun. Pertarungan kekuatan psikis berujung pada kekacauan.

programme.title: The Grey Men 2
programme.desc: Pergantian rezim di Leka memicu konflik di dunia hitam & putih. Polisi mengirim Zheng Zha menyusup ke geng Song Bang, tanpa tahu pihak lain sudah siap membalas dendam.

programme.title: The Lost Bladesman
programme.desc: Petualangan bersejarah nan epik berlatar masa-masa penuh gejolak di masa Tiga Kerajaan. Cao Cao berusaha untuk memasukkan Guan Yu ke dalam pasukannya, tapi Guan tetap setia pada Liu Bei, yang merupakan musuh Cao.

programme.title: Out Of The Dark
programme.desc: Seorang wanita tua tewas setelah terjatuh dari sebuah gedung dan arwahnya menghantui tempat tersebut. Merasa ketakutan, para penjaga keamanan setempat pun meminta bantuan Leo si pemburu hantu beserta asistennya.

programme.title: Iceman
programme.desc: Seorang pengawal kekaisaran dan tiga teman masa kecilnya yang pengkhianat, yang diperintahkan untuk memburunya, secara tidak sengaja terkubur dan membeku dalam waktu. 400 tahun kemudian berlalu dan mereka dicairkan, melanjutkan pertempuran yang mereka tinggalkan.

programme.title: When Fortune Smiles
programme.desc: Kepala keluarga kaya meninggal dunia dan dalam wasiatnya mewariskan kekayaannya kepada putrinya. Putranya marah dan menggunakan seorang pengumpul sampah yang mirip dengan saudara perempuannya untuk mencuri kekayaan tersebut. Putra paman juga menginginkan bagian dari kekayaan itu dan memaksa seorang pencuri kecil untuk mencuri wasiat tersebut demi rencana jahatnya.

programme.title: The Macaque Monkey
programme.desc: Dunia berada dalam kekacauan setelah pohon kehidupan dibakar. Sun Wu Kong pun memutuskan untuk kembali ke masa lalu guna menghidupkannya kembali, tetapi kekuatannya tak stabil usai dirinya kehilangan ikat kepala emas.

programme.title: Night Watch
programme.desc: Sebuah film fantasi-horor berlatar belakang Moskow masa kini, di mana masing-masing kekuatan yang mengendalikan siang dan malam saling bertempur.

programme.title: Unmatchable Match
programme.desc: Gangster kejam Guts melakukan perampokan berlian, lalu meminta bantuan anggota triad lama, Fei, untuk mengatur pembeli. Namun ketika Guts mengkhianati pembeli, Fei malah mendapatkan berlian tersebut, dan dicari oleh polisi serta Guts.

programme.title: Get In The Dark
programme.desc: Nona Qiao meninggal secara tak wajar dan kepala pelayannya membayar seorang perajin untuk membuat sebuah boneka kertas. Serangkaian peristiwa nan mengerikan terjadi saat arwah Nona Qiao bangkit untuk membalas dendam.

programme.title: Hidden Heroine
programme.desc: Sebuah kartel narkoba menduduki wilayah Dong Zhou. Mei Jing dari Unit Komando Wanita Thunderbolt memimpin timnya untuk menyerang markas mereka. Namun, Mei dan timnya disergap dan identitas ayah Mei terungkap.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Mike and Nellie's: In Oakhurst, Gordon Ramsay helps the overwhelmed owner of Mike and Nellie's restaurant, who lost his way when his father and business partner died. (S5 Ep8) [S,SL]

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the Lake District, Paul and Glenda welcome their rival diners to their caravan. Gadget geek David's hosting leaves a lot to be desired. Matt and Polly serve home-grown 'good life' grub. [S]

programme.title: Will My Summer Holiday Be Cancelled?
programme.desc: Dispatches asks: with the Iran War making jet fuel prices soar, are foreign holidays out of the question this year? Or are there bargains to be had if you know where to look?

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: As he celebrates small-space designs, George meets a family who plan to transform a 1960s ambulance into a camper van, and a couple who want to turn their basement into an aquarium. [AD,S,SL]

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Some extra brunch as Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer host the food and chat show. [S]

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the...

programme.title: Discovered with Dan Snow: Terracotta Army (Cut Down) Season 2
programme.desc: Deep in the heart of China lies one of the greatest archaeological treasures ever discovered. For over 2000 years it was lost under the ground. That was until 1974, when a group of farmers found it by chance. We know it today as The Terracotta Army - thousands of life-size soldiers, ready for action in the afterlife. Dan Snow travels to China to explore the amazing story of the chance discovery and also the incredible finds that are still being made today. He also learns the story of the man who had this vast mausoleum made, the First Emperor of China, who ruled by fear and domination but was able to unify China under his power. (Edited version of the original programme The Terracotta Army with Dan Snow.) Exec Prod: Bill Locke; Dir: Mark Edger; History Hit

programme.title: Michael Portillo in Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal is fast becoming the go-to location for Brits to explore and spend their holidays. Portugal's rich and varied locations are attracting millions of us with its year-round sunshine and generous welcome. Now Michael takes us in search of its heart and soul, revealing the secrets of places we know well, and taking us to discover those we don't, including spots in Porto, the Algarve and Madeira. (Compendium edition from the series Portugal with Michael Portillo.) Series Dir: Robin Leach; Exec Prod: Charlie Bunce

programme.desc: Dua bersaudara, satu agen FBI dan yang lainnya pencuci uang internasional, mengesampingkan perbedaan mereka dan bersatu untuk menyelamatkan keluarga mereka dengan mengejar ekstraksi berbahaya jauh di dalam wilayah gembong.

programme.title: Deadly Vendetta
programme.desc: Ketika seorang petugas pemasyarakatan ditemukan tewas di apartemennya, polisi menduga apakah seorang mantan narapidana membalas dendam padanya; namun, segera terungkap bahwa pembunuhan tersebut mungkin tidak terkait dengan pekerjaannya, setelah polisi mengungkap keterlibatan korban dalam segitiga cinta yang berbahaya

programme.title: Tracers
programme.desc: Dicari oleh mafia Tiongkok, seorang kurir sepeda di Kota New York melarikan diri ke dunia parkour setelah bertemu dengan seorang wanita cantik yang tak dikenalnya.

programme.title: Black Site

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: Max Steel
programme.desc: Max McGrath dan rekan aliennya, Steel, harus menggunakan dan menggabungkan kekuatan baru mereka nan luar biasa untuk berubah menjadi pahlawan super Max Steel.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: 24 Hours With BTS In L.A.
programme.desc: sebagai fenomena K-pop global dalam kunjungan besar-besaran pertama mereka ke Los Angeles, di mana grup beranggotakan tujuh orang ini disambut oleh kerumunan penggemar yang antusias dan sorotan media yang gencar. Pada suatu malam langka di akhir perjalanan kilat mereka tepat setelah AMAs, dan sebelum tampil di acara Ellen, para anggota grup naik bus pesta bersama Vogue dan mengguncang kota tersebut.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: Blood Myth
programme.desc: Seorang jurnalis berusaha keras untuk menemukan tunangannya yang hilang dan akhirnya menemukan kebenaran di balik cerita rakyat yang menyeramkan, yang membawanya ke jalan penemuan yang berbahaya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: 73 Questions With Deepika P.
programme.desc: Saat berkunjung ke Kota New York untuk pemotretan Vogue, Deepika Padukone menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Deepika berbagi pengalamannya hidup dengan depresi, membicarakan kemampuan bulu tangkisnya, dan memamerkan gerakan tariannya yang memukau.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: Little Boy
programme.desc: Seorang anak laki-laki berusia delapan tahun bersedia melakukan apa saja untuk mengakhiri Perang Dunia II agar ia dapat membawa pulang ayahnya.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Camila Cabello
programme.desc: Selama berada di pedesaan Inggris, penyanyi keturunan Kuba-Amerika Camila Cabello menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil memetik gitar, Camila bercerita tentang proses penulisan lagunya dan antusiasmenya untuk memerankan versi terbaru Cinderella.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

programme.title: Sasq-Watch!
programme.desc: Penggila Uber, Nigel dan Oscar, hanya ingin mendapatkan bukti pasti tentang Sasquatch. Ketika pemandu mereka memberikan jaminan, mereka harus menggunakan kelompok penggemar aktivitas luar ruangan yang tidak cocok. Sementara itu, saingan mereka, Claus, yang juga sedang memburu "Squatch", berlomba untuk mengalahkan mereka untuk meraih hadiah dalam komedi bergaya dokumenter ini.

programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Cindy Crawford
programme.desc: Kehidupan sehari-hari supermodel Cindy Crawford meliputi berolahraga, makan siang bersama Helena Christensen, dan menyalakan lampu di Empire State Building.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Dan Levy
programme.desc: Bekerja sama dengan Google Nest: Dan Levy, pencipta dan bintang serial TV populer Schitt's Creek, mengundang Vogue ke rumahnya yang diterangi cahaya hangat dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat. Sambil didampingi sahabat setianya, Redmond, aktor yang pernah dinominasikan untuk Emmy ini berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan ayahnya, kecintaannya pada Jepang, serta betapa ia (dengan bangga) menikmati segelas cosmopolitan dengan es batu

programme.title: The Locksmith
programme.desc: Seorang ahli kunci dibebaskan dari penjara dan ditarik kembali ke dunia polisi yang korup dan gangster kota kecil, terlepas dari masa depan yang ia harapkan untuk dibangun bersama mantan tunangannya, seorang detektif, dan putri mereka.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Esther Perel
programme.desc: Psikoterapis terkenal dunia, Esther Perel, cukup sibuk di masa-masa sulit ini. Kini, lebih dari sebelumnya, orang-orang sedang mencari cara untuk menyeimbangkan kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Hailee Steinfeld
programme.desc: Saksikan Hailee Steinfeld, bintang serial “Dickinson”, bersiap-siap untuk menghadiri pemutaran perdana di karpet merah. Hari-hari Steinfeld memang penuh dengan kemewahan, tapi dia juga menyempatkan diri untuk hal-hal kecil. Berfoto selfie di Times Square? Kentang goreng dari layanan kamar? Kenapa tidak?

The End Of The Tour
programme.desc: Kisah wawancara lima hari antara reporter Rolling Stone David Lipsky dan novelis terkenal David Foster Wallace, yang terjadi tepat setelah penerbitan novel epik inovatif Wallace, 'Infinite Jest', pada tahun 1996.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Winnie Harlow
programme.desc: Model terkenal Winnie Harlow membagikan rahasia kecantikan di rumah dan cara yang tepat untuk menikmati sirsak dalam cuplikan eksklusif tentang rutinitas santainya ini. Saksikan saat Winnie melakukan panggilan FaceTime dengan Tory Lanez, menikmati buah-buahan khas Jamaika, dan bermain Cadoo hingga larut malam.

programme.title: Arctic Blast
programme.desc: Ketika gerhana matahari mengirimkan hembusan udara super dingin yang sangat besar ke bumi, hal ini kemudian memicu rangkaian peristiwa bencana yang mengancam akan menelan dunia dalam es dan memulai Zaman Es baru.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: Least Of These Christmas Story
programme.desc: Sebuah kisah Natal yang hangat tentang harapan, pengampunan, dan iman, yang berpusat pada seorang ibu tunggal, putrinya yang berusia tujuh tahun, serta seorang Santa Claus dari Salvation Army.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.title: Iron Fist: Rebellion
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda dianugerahi kemampuan bela diri yang luar biasa serta kekuatan mistis yang dikenal sebagai Iron Fist.

programme.title: An Organized Killer
programme.desc: Grace memiliki kehidupan yang penuh tapi kacau, menyulap bisnis baru, kekasih baru, putri remaja, dan mantan suami yang bersembunyi. Tetapi mempekerjakan asisten pribadi langsung untuk membantunya mengatur segalanya segera menyebabkan hidupnya berantakan.

programme.title: Casablanca
programme.desc: Rick Blaine owns a nightclub in Vichy controlled Casablanca, frequented by refugees desperate to escape German domination. Despite the ever-present human misery, Rick manages to remain uninvolved in World War II now raging across Europe and Northern Africa. But all that changes when Ilsa Lund walks through the front door of Rick's club. Rick must now choose between a life with the woman he loves and becoming the hero that both she and the world need.
