Menceritakan tentang rumah yang baru ditempati oleh Kevin dan Nayla. Mereka bertetangga oleh Julian, Dita dan anaknya Lila. Namun ternyata rumah mereka berpenghuni mahluk halus yang selalu meneror keluarga-nya.

programme.title: Subterfuge
programme.desc: Agar diperbolehkan oleh sang ayah untuk bisa tetap dekat dengan kedua anak gadisnya yang menjadi pujaan Doyok dan Kadir, kedua lelaki tersebut menunjukkan usahanya. Namun dengan cara yang asal-asalan.

programme.title: Rumah Hantu Pasar Malam
programme.desc: Misteri pembunuhan terjadi di pasar malam desa Sumber Sari. Namun daya tarik pasar malam tersebut seakan tidak pernah berhenti menarik pengunjungnya, termasuk kelima sahabat yang sedang mengunjungi desa tersebut.

programme.title: Kawin Kontrak 3
programme.desc: Kang Sono digantikan oleh Gerry sebagai makelar kawin kontrak. 3 orang bernama Ceppy, Itol dan Dani. Petulangan cinta mereka dimulai ketika mereka diperkenalkan Gerry oleh juragan Janda Herang pembisnis kawin kontrak.

programme.title: 5 Hot Girls
programme.desc: Yanti yang berhasil lolos dari penculikan yang mengingini hasil temuan tunangannya menghubungi keempat kawannya yang mempunyai keahlian khusus. Berlima mereka menyelematkan tunangan, ibu dan adiknya yang disandera.

programme.title: Serbuan Halilintar
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang Yulia dan Hendra melawan Ganda dkk, yang berniat merebut kedudukan kepala desa, karena telah merusak ketenangan desa hingga menimbulkan kematian.

programme.title: Dunia Mereka
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang sebuah band yang terdiri dari beberapa orang yang mempertemukan mereka karena selera musik yang sama. Namun dalam perjalanan mereka, berbagai masalah pun berdatangan.

programme.title: Jamila Dan Sang Presiden
programme.desc: Seorang perempuan bernama Jamila tiba-tiba menjadi headline di semua pemberitaan nasional. Ia mengaku membunuh seorang pejabat tinggi dan menolak mengajukan grasi kepada Presiden.

programme.title: Crazy Girl
programme.desc: Keke bukan sembarang anak perempuan, kepalanya penuh dengan cita-cita dan keinginan. Impian Keke yang semakin dekat, tapi suatu kejadian memaksa Keke untuk merelakan mimpi yang sudah diraihnya itu

programme.title: Dear Jo: Almost Is Never Enough
programme.desc: Ella, seorang ibu tunggal asal Indonesia di Bangkok, menjadi ibu pengganti bagi pasangan Jo dan Maura, yang tanpa diduga membawa mereka ke dalam pusaran cinta segitiga yang rumit

programme.title: Love You Love You Not
programme.desc: Sebuah komedi romantis tentang Amira, guru les Bahasa Inggris, dan Juki, pemuda Betawi yang geragasan. Semua dimulai saat Suchin, gadis Thailand yang juga pacar Juki, meminta bantuan Amira, guru les Bahasa Inggrisnya

programme.title: Kalung Jelangkung
programme.desc: Berniat mengisi liburan dengan pergi ke sebuah kampung, Kiki dengan teman-temannya justru mendapatkan musibah setelah merka iseng bermain jailangkung. Sepulang dari kampung tersebut, Kiki yang menemukan kalung diatas kuburan

programme.title: Hotline 666
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Erza yang terperangkap di sebuah rumah angker. Erza merupakan pengantar pizza, saat dia mengantaran pizza ke sebuah rumah an ternyata dihuni oleh Sandra, Miko, dan Dara.

programme.title: Cosmopolitan Queen
programme.desc: Tiga cewek cantik dan bokek mau tidak mau harus jumpalitan, putar otak, dan baca mantra buat mengusir preman yang mau menggusur rumah kost mereka. Sambil rebutan cowok, pula!

programme.title: Skandal
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang seorang wanita yang selingkuh dengan kekasih lamanya karena merasa jenuh dengan kehidupan rumah tangganya. Dengan sifat posesif yang dimiliki kekasih lamanya, teror demi teror mulai diterima wanita itu

programme.title: Senggol Bacok
programme.desc: Galang tempramental & tidak pernah takut apapun, namun ia harus mengendalikan emosinya untuk dapat memenangkan hati sang cewek idaman.

programme.title: Bidadari Pulau Hantu
programme.desc: Evan dan Gesti melakukan pemotretan pre-wedding di pulau yang dikenal sebagai pulau hantu. Pulau ini terkenal dengan sosok hantu perempuan yang membawa celurit dan menggunakan gaun pengantin.

programme.title: Fern Britton: Inside the Vet's
programme.desc: Fern Britton joins much-loved pets and their devoted owners behind the scenes at The Grove Vets, a busy family practice in the suburbs of Bristol run by husband-and-wife team Andy and Amy Valencia - this episode sees Fern meet Arthur, a 12-year-old rescue cat with diabetes whose owner Kerina is using the latest technology to monitor her pet's blood sugar levels. Elsewhere, vet Amy performs surgery to remove a lump from King Charles Spaniel Eddie, James neuters a dog called Barney who has been rescued from Macedonia, Fern helps out when young Cavapoo Mila gets preventative treatment, and we find out about the work of the Holly Hedge Animal Sanctuary which rehomes 400 cats and dogs each year.

programme.title: Keane & Vieira - Best of Enemies
programme.desc: Roy Keane and Patrick Vieira hated each other - Keane described himself as being 'in a war' with Vieira, and their infamous tunnel bust-up in February 2005 has entered folklore. They fought on the pitch and they tried to fight off of it, but most fans would agree that Roy Keane and Patrick Vieira were the two footballing warriors that defined their age. In this explosive documentary, the two men come together to explain why they hated each other, what they really thought of Sir Alex Ferguson and Arsene Wenger, and what it means to be the best of enemies.

programme.title: Millionaire Hot Seat
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson hosts the exciting and fast-paced quiz where each episode sees six hopefuls compete for a one-million-pound prize - however, only one player can take their place in the Hot Seat at a time and answer multiple-choice questions to work their way up the Money Ladder. Unlike classic Millionaire, each question is against the clock and there is no room for indecision - if a player answers correctly, they remain in the Hot Seat and continue up the Money Ladder, but if they get a question wrong, they are eliminated, the Top Prize drops down, and the next player takes their place. Each player is given one Pass - a chance to pass the question on to the next player - but in doing so forfeit their place in the Hot Seat and risk not making it back there later on. Only one player will have a chance to win the top prize remaining on the ladder, and the player taking on that question must answer it correctly to take home the cash.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Reece wakes from a surreal nightmare to find Disneyland Darren standing in his bedroom after Jodie lets him stay in the spare room. His return sparks tension with Mr Dunn, now dating Jodie, and Darren’s chaos disrupts the household. At school, it’s Refugee Awareness Week led by the woke Brimble. After derailing events with pranks, Reece is forced by headmaster Meachy to help her, but another prank goes too far and publicly humiliates her, leaving him unexpectedly feeling guilty. Meanwhile, Darren’s jealousy of Dunn spirals into absurd mind games. At Jodie’s 40th birthday party, Darren and Dunn compete for attention with speeches and dance routines. The mood shifts when Jodie takes in two kids after their mum is sectioned, helping Reece realise real care can be helping those closer to home. He later shares this with The Brimble, beginning an unlikely friendship.

programme.title: Romesh Ranganathan's Parents' Evening

Romesh also teaches his mum how to deliver bad news to a Spice Girl and Shanthi shares a cherished memory involving a window, the fire brigade, and a 'pair of round buttocks'.

programme.desc: Home improvement programme where contractor Brian McCourt and designer Sarah Keenleyside help to expand living spaces by tapping into people's backyards. programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Animated comedy series about family life. When a 'wardrobe malfunction' occurs during a live broadcast, the Federal Communications Commission begins to censor Peter's favourite television shows. As a result, Peter creates his own TV station which broadcasts from the Griffin home. Peter and Brian create their own edgy programming for the station, until the FCC shows up to shut down PTV and censor all controversial material in Quahog.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about CIA agent Stan Smith. Because of a past incident at his own prom, where he was lured into a dance with the homecoming queen only to have a pile of pigs dropped on him, Stan wants revenge by showing off that he married a homecoming queen, Francine. A proud Stan accompanies Francine to her reunion, but when they find out that two ballots were lost and that Francine didn't actually win the crown, Stan is devastated.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series from the creator of Family Guy about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. When the CIA organises a father-son baseball game, Stan is determined to show his co-workers that his son is masculine and athletic. Unfortunately, Steve is a geek, so Stan decides to lie and ditches him.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers

Meanwhile, Gene and Louise stockpile huge amounts of combustible wish paper.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Grady Felton returns home to Midsomer after serving time for the murder of local youngster Daniel Denning, and Daniel's extended family are angry at his reappearance. Around the time that Grady arrives, his defence barrister Giles Harrison is killed. Grady had threatened Harrison and others - including Jones - but his alibi is strong. Later, Grady's house is firebombed, leaving him in a coma. Daniel's former friend Fred Burns is on trial for drugs offences. When Barnaby looks into Fred's background, he finds that a large sum of money appeared in Fred's bank account after the attack on Grady. After the court appearance, Jones learns that another lawyer on Grady's hit-list has been killed - but since Grady is in intensive care, he could not have been the culprit. As the detectives look further into the case, they discover that Grady always claimed innocence. Could a 'friend' be acting out Grady's revenge plan?

programme.desc: When an arson attack on a Turkish club claims 17 lives, DS Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin are under pressure to discover just who was behind it. programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama based on characters created by crime writer Ann Cleeves. Vera's reunion with Stuart Macken, her first-ever sergeant, occurs under tragic circumstances when his house is petrol bombed - Stuart is badly burned by the attack and his 18-year-old daughter Stella is left fighting for her life in intensive care. Vera is shocked to see that Stuart is a shadow of the man that she knew 20 years before, and she is faced with some long-buried memories of her own when her investigation uncovers unpleasant revelations about his personal life.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: When gynaecologist Dr Alec Merrick is accused of sexually assaulting one of his patients during a routine examination, DS Ronnie Brooks, DS Matt Devlin and DI Natalie Chandler are brought in to investigate. But how can they find enough evidence when it's just one person's word against another, and one party is an eminent doctor? Matt and Ronnie bring the case to Crown Prosecutor James Steel and they find themselves grappling with the grey areas of sexual assault charges. But when they begin to feel, along with George Castle, Director of the CPS in London, that they can get no further with this case, Crown Prosecutor Alesha Phillips refuses to accept his orders. As our team splinter, they find themselves up against unstoppable defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone, and with a thin case and a dangerous level of emotional involvement, they must battle it out in court. But who will the jury believe?

His reappearance leaves people to presume it is so he can collect the money once stolen from the bank. Greengrass finds a new vocation as a lucky chimney sweep.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly GP. Louisa is leaving for Spain with baby James and says an awkward goodbye to Martin - the Doc goes back to his consultation room, but he is distracted and walks out before going to find Ruth, who tells him that all his problems stem from his childhood because his parents never showed him any love and that he has the propensity to change. As Bert and Jennifer's engagement party goes off with a bang due to a faulty generator that comes as a shock to DJ Caroline - and Al pitches his vision for Ruth's farmhouse to become a bed and breakfast to her - Martin tries to book a flight to Spain to get Louisa back. While on hold, the Doc sorts through his mail and finds a scan of Louisa's brain - when he spots a malformation, he knows that the pressure in an aeroplane could trigger it to bleed and that Louisa has recently taken anticoagulants. If the malformation were to bleed, Louisa would be at risk of suffering a brain haemorrhage...

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a curmudgeonly country doctor and his patients in Cornwall. The Doc is back in Portwenn but without Louisa, who is taking some time out with her mother in Spain - Martin is left wondering if she will ever come back to him, but he is scheduled to see therapist Dr Rachel Timoney in a bid to give his marriage another chance in the meantime. Meanwhile, Al is fretting about his half-decorated B and B while Steve Baker, the man supposed to be helping, is busy organising a lifeboat exercise - when the time for the exercise comes round, the mock rescue becomes all too real and Martin is out at sea as the time for his first therapy session approaches.

programme.title: The Protectors

programme.title: Battlebots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. programme.title: Magnum P.I.

programme.title: Rasyah The Wonder Kid

programme.title: Ricis The Adventure

programme.title: Dragons

programme.desc: From 2022. It's been four years since Isla Nublar was destroyed, and the dinosaurs now live side by side with humans. Will man manage to be the planet's reigning predator, now that it is shared with history's most dangerous creatures?

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Doomsday
programme.desc: In Doomsday, a deadly virus resurfaces decades after quarantine. As chaos erupts, a team enters the walled-off zone to find a cure. Action-packed and gritty, it's a battle for survival.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 1
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen has returned home safe after winning the 74th Annual Hunger Games. She senses that a rebellion is simmering, but the Capitol is still very much in control as the next Hunger Games is prepared—a competition that could change Panem forever.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Catching Fire
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen dan Peeta Mellark menjadi target Capitol setelah kemenangan mereka dalam Hunger Games ke-74 memicu pemberontakan di Distrik Panem.

programme.title: Battleship
programme.desc: In Battleship, Earth battles a powerful alien force across sea, sky, and land. Directed by Peter Berg and starring Liam Neeson, Taylor Kitsch, and Rihanna, it's explosive action at sea.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 1
programme.desc: The worldwide phenomenon continues. Katniss (Jennifer Lawrence) has survived and destroyed the Hunger Games, and now rises with District 13 to fight against President Snow (Donald Sutherland).

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 1
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen berada di Distrik 13 setelah ia menghancurkan dunia game selamanya. Di bawah kepemimpinan Presiden Coin dan nasihat dari teman-teman kepercayaannya, Katniss mengembangkan sayapnya saat ia berjuang menyelamatkan Peeta dan bangsa yang tergerak oleh keberaniannya.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Keanu Reeves stars in 47 Ronin, an epic fantasy where an outcast joins samurai on a quest for vengeance and honor against a ruthless overlord in ancient Japan.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Setelah seorang panglima perang yang berkhianat membunuh tuan mereka dan membuang kaum mereka, 47 samurai tanpa pemimpin bersumpah untuk membalas dendam dan mengembalikan kehormatan kepada kaum mereka.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Katniss Everdeen secara sukarela menggantikan adik perempuannya dalam Hunger Games: sebuah kompetisi televisi di mana dua remaja dari masing-masing dua belas Distrik Panem dipilih secara acak untuk bertarung sampai mati.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: Hunger Games: Mockingjay, Pt 2 (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Katniss dan tim pemberontak dari Distrik 13 bersiap untuk pertempuran terakhir yang akan menentukan nasib Panem.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Tokoh utama Kanton, Fong Sai Yuk, terlibat dalam persaudaraan rahasia "Bunga Merah", yang berusaha menggulingkan kaisar Manchuria dan membangun kembali dinasti Ming. Gejolak sosial tersebut dipadukan dengan konflik moral pribadi Sai Yuk tentang bagaimana menyesuaikan diri dengan rezim persaudaraan yang kaku, dan di samping itu, menyelesaikan kehidupan cintanya yang rumit, dengan dua calon istri.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Academy Award®-Nominee Sylvester Stallone stars in this explosive action-thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat until the final, powerful frame!

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: RZA co-writes, directs, and stars in this genre-blending, hip-hop-infused kung fu film set in Hong Kong, featuring Russell Crowe, Lucy Liu, and produced by Quentin Tarantino.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Chris joins his girlfriend Rose for a weekend at her family's estate. At first, their warm welcome seems like awkwardness about their interracial relationship—until disturbing truths emerge.

programme.title: Get Out
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda Afrika-Amerika mengunjungi orangtua pacarnya yang berkulit putih untuk akhir pekan, di mana kegelisahannya yang membara tentang penerimaan mereka terhadapnya akhirnya mencapai titik didih.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2

programme.desc: Dan is a struggling rancher who volunteers to safely deliver Ben Wade, the captured leader of a gang of thieves, to a train station where the 3:10 to Yuma will transport him to trial. Ben's gang of cutthroats and robbers has other plans.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang peternak kecil setuju untuk menahan seorang penjahat yang tertangkap, yang sedang menunggu kereta untuk pergi ke pengadilan di Yuma. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi saat penjahat itu mencoba mengelabui peternak tersebut.

programme.desc: In 2084, construction worker Douglas Quaid visits Rekall for a virtual Mars vacation—but the procedure unlocks hidden memories, thrusting him into a deadly rebellion and a secret-agent past.

programme.title: Total Recall
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pekerja pabrik, Douglas Quaid, berubah drastis saat ia menjadi buronan setelah mengunjungi Rekall, sebuah perusahaan yang menanamkan memori buatan pada klien-kliennya.

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Waterworld (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Mariner, seorang pengembara misterius di Bumi pasca-apokaliptik, bertemu dengan seorang wanita dan putrinya, lalu menawarkan bantuan untuk membawa mereka ke tempat aman. Bersama-sama mereka memulai sebuah petualangan yang dapat menyelamatkan umat manusia.

programme.title: Cape Fear
programme.desc: In Cape Fear, Robert De Niro plays a vengeful ex-con stalking his former lawyer, played by Nick Nolte. Directed by Martin Scorsese, this suspense-filled thriller is a chilling classic remake.

programme.title: Cape Fear (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang terpidana pemerkosaan, yang dibebaskan dari penjara setelah menjalani hukuman empat belas tahun, menguntit keluarga pengacara yang awalnya membelanya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing (Rock Action)
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.title: 3:10 To Yuma
programme.desc: Seorang peternak kecil setuju untuk menahan seorang penjahat yang tertangkap, yang sedang menunggu kereta untuk pergi ke pengadilan di Yuma. Pertarungan sengit pun terjadi saat penjahat itu mencoba mengelabui peternak tersebut.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood
programme.desc: Rambo, seorang veteran Pasukan Khusus Green Beret, berhadapan dengan seorang sheriff di wilayah Pasifik Barat Laut dan Garda Nasional.

programme.title: The Man With The Iron Fists
programme.desc: Dalam perburuan harta karun emas yang melegenda, sekelompok prajurit, pembunuh, dan seorang prajurit Inggris yang jahat mendatangi sebuah desa di Tiongkok feodal, tempat seorang pandai besi yang rendah hati berupaya membela dirinya dan penduduk desa lainnya.

programme.title: 47 Ronin
programme.desc: Setelah seorang panglima perang yang berkhianat membunuh tuan mereka dan membuang kaum mereka, 47 samurai tanpa pemimpin bersumpah untuk membalas dendam dan mengembalikan kehormatan kepada kaum mereka.

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse, Pt 1
programme.desc: Tsunami menghancurkan Waikiki dan memicu bencana berantai. Gunung berapi meletus, air mendidih muncul dari bumi, Hoover Dam runtuh, hingga Mount Rushmore meledak oleh lava.

programme.title: Mr. Peabody & Sherman

programme.title: Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Kembali ke Downton Abbey saat keluarga Crawley yang tercinta dan staf mereka yang pemberani bersiap untuk kunjungan kerajaan dari Raja dan Ratu Inggris dalam pengalaman sinematik yang megah ini.

programme.title: The Jackal
programme.desc: Ketika seorang pembunuh bayaran internasional yang misterius sulit dilacak, FBI terpaksa membebaskan dan bekerja sama dengan seorang teroris yang dipenjara karena ia satu-satunya yang mengenali target.

programme.title: The Chronicles of Riddick
programme.desc: Menjadi buronan yang paling dicari, Riddick terjebak di penjara bawah tanah yang kejam. Ia harus melarikan diri bersama sosok masa lalunya sekaligus menghentikan serangan pasukan Necromonger.

programme.title: The Ones You Didn't Burn

programme.title: War of The Arrows
programme.desc: Dua kakak beradik, Nam Yi dan Ja In melarikan diri ketika desa dan keluarga mereka diserang tentara Manchu dari Dinasti Qing.13 tahun kemudian, Nam Yi tumbuh menjadi pemanah yang hebat. Sementara Ja In akan dinikahkan dengan putra keluarga Kim Mu Seon, keluarga yang merawat mereka. Namun, pembantaian terjadi dan Ja in diculik.

programme.desc: Dua tentara, seorang warga Korea Selatan paruh baya dan seorang remaja Korea Utara, bertemu di Front Barat selama Perang Korea. Tak lama setelah perebutan sebuah tank, mereka menyadari bahwa mereka berdua adalah korban perang dan membentuk persaudaraan.

programme.title: The Way Home (tvN Movies)
programme.desc: Kisah seorang anak laki-laki berusia 7 tahun, Sang-woo, yang lahir dan dibesarkan di kota besar, dan neneknya yang bisu, yang telah menghabiskan seluruh hidupnya di sebuah desa kecil di pedesaan.

programme.title: Holy Night: Demon Hunters
programme.desc: Sebuah film aksi okultisme di mana sebuah tim yang terdiri dari beberapa orang melawan roh jahat.

programme.title: Love My Scent
programme.desc: Changsu kebetulan mendapat parfum spesial. Parfum mempunyai keistimewaan yang menarik bagi para wanita. Ara juga tertarik dengan parfum tersebut dan bertemu dengan Changsu.

programme.title: The Book Of Fish
programme.desc: Cendekiawan Joseon Chung Yak-jeon diasingkan selama Persekusi umat Katolik pada tahun 1801. Ia bertemu dengan seorang nelayan dan memutuskan untuk bertukar ilmu pengetahuan dengannya demi menulis buku tentang ikan.

programme.title: The Unfair

programme.title: Suraj Pe Mangal Bhari
programme.desc: Suraj, seorang pria lajang idaman, ditolak oleh keluarga dari beberapa calon pengantin. Namun, ia segera menyadari bahwa penyebabnya adalah seorang detektif pernikahan bernama Madhu Mangal Rane.

programme.title: जुर्म
programme.desc: Pada suatu malam, Sanjana dibunuh dan Avinash ditangkap karena membunuh istrinya itu. Soniya, kekasih gelap Avinash, mendampinginya selama persidangan. Apa yang mendorong Avinash melakukan kejahatan ini?

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: BMW S 1000 XR und Harley-Davidson LiveWire
programme.desc: The new BMW S 1000 XR is something like a BMW X6 on two wheels: the all-round qualities of an SUV, plus extreme sportiness with 160 hp. We test the new XR around Barcelona. In addition: For two weeks, around 150 drivers race along country roads and through towns at top speeds of over 300 km/h. We get to the bottom of the Tourist Trophy myth. And: An electric Harley is currently racing across roads all over the world as a prototype called LiveWire. Journalists, dealers and customers test the electric-powered Harley without a V2 engine and a roaring sound. The electricity bullet is scheduled to come onto the market before 2020. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Racing legend Hans Joachim Stuck, known as Strietzel, says goodbye to active racing at the 24-hour race. He won the first 24-hour race here at the age of just 19 and therefore chose the Nürburgring for his farewell performance. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: It was actually supposed to be the final day, but in the end only the super athletes and sidecars started, while the senior was postponed to the next day. However, history was written once again in the extremely competitive second super sports race. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Motorcycling – a hobby or sport with an adrenaline rush, but also with risk. The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The automotive industry is currently changing completely: vehicles are developing into autonomous, fully networked digital devices. Road safety should improve significantly. But how do assistance systems actually work? And how safe are self-driving cars? MOTORVISION looks over the shoulders of Daimler engineers – shortly before the launch of the new S-Class in autumn 2017. (Station information).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the epitome of luxury, they are irresistible and breathtaking, they are the automotive upper class, the English limousines. Whether Bentley, Rolls Royce or Jaguar, built with the most expensive materials, English limousines combine timeless luxury, unique comfort and superior power. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and expensive English limousines. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The world's largest racing event for historic vehicles - the Goodwood Revival in England. Hosted by a count, the Earl of March. Over 150,000 fans flock to the country estate of the aristocratic racing fan. Visitors can expect many highlights, such as the race for the Shelby Cup, in which around 30 hot AC Cobras fight for fame and honor. Contemporary clothing is a must, racing legends do the honors, and you won't find more beautiful vintage cars from motorsport days gone by anywhere else. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: A world record of superlatives. The Porsche Taycan enters the Guinness Book of Records. Also: The hydrogen Hyundai Nexo, at the Hockenheimring with Walter Röhrl and the Skoda Trekka from the 1960s. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: In part 2 of the 120 years of Mercedes Motorsport, Car History tells the story of Mercedes in motorsport with many original recordings and original interviews, from the comeback after the accident in Le Mans, the beginnings of rallying in the sixties, the legendary appearance with the red pig in Spa, the countless DTM successes, the return to Le Mans with the prototypes to the Formula 1 World Championships with Mika Häkkinen and the triumph with your own team in Formula 1. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Today we start with our Nordschleife tourists, who - as soon as the track is a little drier - appear again at the ring and pursue their favorite hobby: accelerate and let the tires smoke! (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Around the world in a sailing catamaran. Her name is Royal Clipper, the queen of the seas. She is a five-masted full-rigged ship and the largest true sailing ship in the world. Three days on board give you the opportunity to explore the ship from the bilge to the 55 meter high masthead and to show how a special kind of cruiser works. The captain and his hotel manager are happy to present the ship and chief engineer Aleksander also gives a tour of his kingdom. Chef Rudy from the Philippines prepares one of his delicious specialties. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: They don't make room in the fast lane: sporty off-road vehicles. From mini-SUVs to luxury off-road vehicles, the boom is not slowing down. In Perfect Ride we get to the bottom of it all. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The BMW 2002 Turbo was an absolute blast in its day. A real racer and Porsche killer. The Mercedes C111 was developed as a concept study. With a Wankel engine, sophisticated aerodynamics and a number of technical innovations. Michelle Mouton was certainly the fastest female rally driver in the history of rallying. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.sub-title: Visit to the trade fair with a celebrity bonus
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. The German Race Wars invite you to sprint over the quarter mile. Fast cars, smoking tires and full throttle at the starting lights. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: Fog, darkness, a rear-end collision with many cars. This happens again and again on German motorways. The “Stunt Heroes” recreate such a scene. It is the starting point for a stunt with people burning, a firefighter who arrives too late and a car that blows up. You can see how this works in this episode of the stunt report series. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Top Speed ​​presenter Martin Utberg visits the Oldtimer Gallery Toffen in Switzerland, where he completes a course to become an auctioneer, drives two special classic cars and meets one of the few female mechanics in the classic car scene. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Porsche now offers 27 derivatives of its cult model 911. The selection has never been so large. And it has never been possible to examine all models in one place until today! We are literally speed dating with the Porsche 911. Which variant can win the heart of Motorvision presenter Julian on a road trip through the Black Forest and the Palatinate and why? (Station info).

programme.title: FIM X-Trial World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Fédération Internationale de Motocyclisme has organized the X-Trial World Championship annually since 1993. In contrast to the outdoor discipline, the X-Trail competitions take place indoors. (Station info).

programme.title: FIM Sidecarcross World Championship 2026
programme.sub-title: GP of France, Castelnau de Levis

programme.title: FIM Enduro World Championship 2026
programme.desc: The show follows the world's best enduro pilots as they compete around the globe. (Station info).

programme.title: King of the Roads 2024
programme.desc: Kind of the Roads is a motorcycle road racing series where riders reach speeds of up to 200 mph (channel info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Going Pro 2026
programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The format shows the highlights of various competitions from the international motorsport universe. The focus is on emotional racing moments, spectacular images and the stories behind the most important events in the scene. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times. VW is working with Ford to save costs and pool expertise on the new van. At Volvo, safety has always been a priority – and that also applies to its trucks. And 5 exciting facts about the Mercedes eCitaro NMC4. (Station info).

programme.title: 4x4 – Das Allrad Magazin
programme.desc: Sand, scree, water or asphalt Adventures can be had on any surface if you have the right vehicle. The Can-Am Outlander and Maverick R are the ultimate fun machines for off-road driving fun. We put them to the test in Portugal. And this is supposed to be a Smart? Yes, actually #5 turns everything we thought we knew about the popular kissing ball upside down. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: For the first time in its glorious and long history, the traditional Italian brand Ducati is venturing into the cruiser segment. With a long and flat silhouette and forward footrests for comfortable gliding, the 156 hp The new Duc is supposed to conquer the US market and beat Harley-Davidson not only with its own weapons, but with completely new ones. MOTORVISION TV tested the new XDiavel in San Diego on classic cruiser terrain. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: Their business is cars that don't drive. Regardless of whether it is an accident or illegal parking: cars that are not moving have to get out of the way. A case for the tow truckers. They clean up the traffic. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: Artega – Visit to the youngest German sports car manufacturer. A look behind the scenes of the manufactory. Test Artega GT after the facelift. Introducing the Artega SE electric vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: More than any other vehicle, they represent the American lifestyle, US SUVs and pickups. They are extremely large, extremely strong and extremely luxurious and convey the feeling of unlimited possibilities and adventure. Whether it's the Cadillac Escalade, Chevrolet Tahoe, Ford Raptor or Dodge Ram, US SUVs and pickups are the kings of the highway. Dream Cars presents the most spectacular, powerful and exclusive US SUVs and pickups. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The creators of the Apollo 3500 GT wanted to camouflage and deceive. The appearance of the sleek two-seater, which was released in 1962, is pure Italy, from the chrome spoke wheels, the leather-lined interior to the Pininfarina-style body. The Apollo's creators and technology come from the USA. There's a V8 engine from Buick under the long hood for good reason. The cheap technology should make the GT 3500 affordable on the American market. Nevertheless, the project was not a great success. Only just under 100 pieces were made. Today the Apollo 3500 GT is rarer than many classic Ferraris. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: No consumer good is fought over as fiercely and as expensively as the car. As soon as the first car started rolling in 1886, advertising began to tout the great benefits of motor vehicles for humanity. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: BMW M1, the legendary vehicles of the Procar series, are all back at the start in Salzburg for the first time. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: One of the top topics in this episode of Perfect Ride: topless models. With them, every adventure starts with a thrill: Spyder, Speedster, Roadster – in short: convertibles. Free driving and feeling of life in all variations (channel information).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Only the best for Christmas. The topics today at Tuning: Our editorial team always goes full throttle. Best of eroticism. Peaceful Christmas time? Not at the X-mas Race in Eisenach. Things get busy here even in winter. Abt and MTM put the Audi R8 on the gift table. Which is the better package? And: Listen up! The best sounds with goosebumps guaranteed. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The “Stunt Heroes” from action concept film a car rollover. But that's not enough for stunt coordinator Carl. His motto: if already, then already! That's why he throws in a juicy shootout at the same time. He also has a surprise in store for his workshop boss: Uwe should sit in the passenger seat when the vehicle rolls over - for the very first time! New spectacular report about the creation of a car stunt! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, classic car rally expert Christian von Hofmann explains how to drive special stages in classic car rallies and how the various devices work. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: English luxury and German lifestyle. With an extended wheelbase, the Bentley Bentayga focuses on its rear passengers and pampers them with flawless workmanship and a champagne cooler. In the Mercedes CLE 53, however, the best place is behind the steering wheel. Mercedes wants to arouse emotions again with a 3-liter in-line six-cylinder engine. (Station info).

programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

The Audi quattro, also called Urquattro, is a sports coupe from the Audi brand that was manufactured for a good ten years starting in 1980. The Urquattro is part of the success story of Audi's quattro drive in sports and road vehicles. Reporter Maximilian Engert presents the vehicle. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Only the best for Christmas. The topics today at Tuning: Our editorial team always goes full throttle. Best of eroticism. Peaceful Christmas time? Not at the X-mas Race in Eisenach. Things get busy here even in winter. Abt and MTM put the Audi R8 on the gift table. Which is the better package? And: Listen up! The best sounds with goosebumps guaranteed. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The “Stunt Heroes” from action concept film a car rollover. But that's not enough for stunt coordinator Carl. His motto: if already, then already! That's why he throws in a juicy shootout at the same time. He also has a surprise in store for his workshop boss: Uwe should sit in the passenger seat when the vehicle rolls over - for the very first time! New spectacular report about the creation of a car stunt! (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: “BMW Motorrad Vision Next 100” is the name of the motorcycle of the future. A helmet is no longer necessary, connectivity delivers all the information on a pair of driver glasses. In addition to the world premiere of the Future Bike in Santa Monica, our Los Angeles special takes us into the present with the new BMW G 310 R and into the past on the L.A. road trip: Designer Ola Stenegard draws inspiration from bygone eras. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: “Setra” – this name applies worldwide to buses of the highest quality. One of the largest and most modern bus factories in the world is located here in Neu-Ulm. EvoBus GmbH – a wholly owned subsidiary of Daimler AG – produces transport vehicles on over 700,000 square meters. Well over 3,000 Setra and Mercedes buses leave the production halls every year. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: The development of electromobility continues to advance. At the beginning the technology was still expensive, but now more and more vehicles are appearing for the general public. Volkswagen offers the ID.3. Hyundai has different electric drives for the Kona and Nissan has an absolute bestseller in its range with the Leaf. We test what these cars can do in everyday life. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are the most exciting cars in the world and arouse more desire than any other vehicle, the international coupes from Maserati, Porsche, Bentley, Mercedes and Rolls Royce. With their extraordinary design and powerful engines, coupes arouse more emotions than any other car; they are the epitome of elegance and exclusivity in automobile construction. Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking dream coupes in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He has a famous name and should heat up the Ferraris on the race track. The Bizzarrini GT 5300 from 1965. Giotto Bizzarrini, the creator of the famous Ferrari GTO, wanted to use this car to return the favor to his former employer Enzo Ferrari, because the employment relationship ended in a dispute. But the Italian super sports car with the American V8 heart failed spectacularly. Today, however, the Bizzarrini 5300 GT is a sought-after collector's item and is often more expensive than a Ferrari. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The Macan is one of the most successful Porsche models. We are dedicating ourselves to the new edition of the Macan Turbo. Also: the Hyundai i20 in the test and another round at the Toyota winter driving school in Saalfelden, this time in the RAV4 and the classic Land Cruiser BJ 42. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The epitome of automotive industrialization. Only a few manufacturers are equally active in the USA and Europe so early. And with success – despite the different demands and needs of both markets. While the Mustang inspires American youth with automobiles, the Capri turns the heads of Europeans. Two continents, one unique story. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name “Green Hell”. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” – a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Dubai – the largest and most important Motor Sow in the Middle East takes place here. The sheikhs have a penchant for fast and exclusive vehicles, so everything that has a reputation in the car world is gathered here. And: Supercars go straight from the stand in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Machine versus nature. A bit of madness is part of it when off-road enthusiasts drive breakneck maneuvers in the toughest off-road trophies with 800 HP monsters. They bite the hard stone. These include the most robust vehicles. We look off the roads and find some top off-roaders. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Half a century of Ferrari. Rearview Mirror gets to the bottom of the Ferrari myth and takes a closer look at the red racers from Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: People's sport and people's fun. The topics in tuning today: Bavarian whirlwind: Tuner Hartge builds a lot of engine in very little BMW. The impressive result: The Hartge Compact 3.3 with 343 hp. Italian charmer: The Alfa 156 GTA shines with a wonderful V6, 250 hp and a sound to kneel down on. Does it also impress on the Nordschleife? Nocturnal twisting worm: The Night Drift Challenge in Oschersleben. Wolfsburg noble plane: The Golf R32 is not only elegant but also really sporty. 241 hp plus all-wheel drive make it possible. And: Allgäu DTM flair at home: The Abt Audi TT Limited 2. From the race track to the road. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: At Action Concept it gets down to business: young stuntmen Daniel is supposed to do a forward somersault with his car. And beat up his colleague Lars. Adrenaline in its purest form – and all just for the camera. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​presenter Martin Utberg and his wife Emma organize an annual vintage car tour for a select group: the Classic Hebrst Tour. This year the route leads from Seefeld in Tyrol to the Dolomites and Lake Iseo. After 700 kilometers the tour goes back to Seefeld via the Timmelsjoch. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is the vision of an electric future from AMG: The Concept AMG GT XX delivers an incredible 1360 hp and charges faster than you can say range anxiety. We were there for the spectacular world premiere. And: This racer looks like it came out of a retro film but is the brand new top model from Morgan. We reveal five exciting facts about this British work of art. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM F1H2O World Powerboat Championship 2025
programme.desc: Curtain up for Formula 1 in motorboat racing: According to the world umbrella organization UIM, the H20 is the fastest outboard racing boat series in circuit racing and has been dominated by Philippe Chiappe for years. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, Eric van Lammeren tells the special story behind the recreation of the Bugatti Type 41 Royale prototype, which Ettore Bugatti used as a private vehicle for five years and which was considered lost for a long time after a crash. In the SML CarGroup showroom, Eric speaks to an audience with Thomas Hientz and presenter Martin Utberg about the background and fascination of this extraordinary project. Martin and Thomas are also traveling in a very special Mercedes-AMG PureSpeed. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.sub-title: The Knight from Scotland – Sir Jackie Stewart
programme.desc: Sir Jackie Stewart is one of the most famous British racing drivers and is celebrated for more than just his three world championship wins. He has also made a name for himself through his work to improve the safety of racing drivers. The number of his Formula 1 victories pales in comparison to the number of people whose lives the Scottish driver has saved. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: The whole fascination of motorcycles: from super sports cars, naked bikes or tourers to cruisers, supermotos, freestyle motocross or racing machines. We drive anything that has two wheels. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good shape, others a little polished - the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: The British county of Chesire, in the tranquil town of Crewe, has been home to one of the most exclusive automobile manufacturers for 70 years: Bentley Motors. 400 hours of pure manual work, meticulous accuracy, a lot of technical know-how and a lot of passion from the employees turn the top model, the Bentley Mulsanne, into a sculpture on wheels. At Bentley, not only luxury traditionally plays a role, but also performance. Bentley Boy Steven Kane chases the Bentley Mulsanne Speed, which goes over 300 km/h and costs around 325,000 euros, around the race track. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Compact, efficient and environmentally friendly. Electric minis are redefining urban lifestyles. With the Rocks-e, Opel wants to revolutionize city traffic and help young people get their first car. The e.GO Life has space for four people and a range that should be sufficient for everyday life. We tested it! Also: An overview of the latest small electric cars. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Italy is the country of fashion, design and the most exciting cars in the world. In no other country are there as many well-known manufacturers of sports cars as in Italy. Ferrari, Lamborghini, Maserati and Alfa Romeo are considered the epitome of breathtaking cars around the world, designed with stunning shapes, capricious engines and unparalleled passion. Dream Cars presents the most exclusive and fastest sports cars from Ferrari, Maserati, Lamborghini and Alfa Romeo. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: He helped found the legend of the German Silver Arrows: the Mercedes W 125 Grand Prix car from 1937. Big names like Rudolf Caracciola and Manfred von Brauchitsch competed for victories in the single-seater with up to over 600 hp. At the Großglockner Grand Prix, former Formula 1 driver Jochen Mass drives the Silver Arrow up the 92 curves to the Großglockner. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. We subjected this model to extensive practical testing. Also: the Lexus RX, the revised version of the premium SUV from Toyota's luxury brand on the test site in Ibiza. And: Volkswagen is also launching a new model variant of the e-Up! after. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.sub-title: Mercedes racing: the beginning of an era
programme.desc: Power, passion, pole position – Mercedes has been writing motorsport history for 120 years. The list of successes of the brand with the star is long. As early as 1894, a Daimler and a Benz took part in the first car race. The victories at the French Grand Prix in 1908 and 1914 are outstanding. Car History shows how Mercedes dominated racing from the first automobile race onwards. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: Bavaria Historic Rally Around 3,000 “Schnauferl” cavort in front of a picturesque. Polished to a high gloss, for some people it's more sporty, for others it's more comfortable and for others, above all, it's "skillful" on the slopes. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: When choosing a vehicle, price plays a role, as does equipment, drive, space and much more. There are certain characteristics that manufacturers use to assign their vehicle models to a vehicle class. However, there is no clear and generally valid definition of these classes and the boundaries are often blurred. S in the luxury class from Mercedes-Benz is not the same as S in the Audi S3. What does Q stand for on the Infinity Q50 for more quality? We present the vehicles and visit the Shanghai Auto Show, one of the most important automobile exhibitions in China. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Four powered wheels are better than two. This was once established. The Quattro drive is now almost 30 years old. Rearview mirror presents Audi and the Quattro drive. An innovative and very successful story. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The stuntheroes from Action Concept are tough professionals. They throw themselves off houses, cause cars to fly or explode. Without the necessary seriousness and constant concentration when carrying out your work, nothing works. We sent our reporter Dean Malay to Action Concept to get to know the people, the characters behind the hard shell. Stunt coordinator Domi shows Dean the work processes at Action Concept, but also explains why the stuntman is called Tobi, Heidi. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg welcomes the former racing driver and car designer Erich Bitter in Seefeld in Tyrol. During a tour of the Seefeld Olympic region, the now 87-year-old Bitter talks about his life, his career and his passions. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: It is considered the most successful luxury sedan in the world, a synonym for comfort and opulence and sets standards in terms of technology and safety: the Mercedes S-Class. But why is that so? What makes this vehicle so special and sets it apart from all others? We drive all model series, from the 450 SEL 6.9 to the current S 580 e, and explore the fascination of each model. (Station info).

programme.title: Rally 2024
programme.desc: Chantilly Arts & Elegance combines motorsport history with haute couture in an exclusive event. Historic racing cars, elegant bodies and stylish fashion presentations make this meeting unique. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Top Speed ​​is all about classic automobiles. Moderator Martin Utberg actively takes part in the most beautiful classic car events in the world. Here you not only see old cars, but also experience the whole history of the classic jewels and their owners. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy 2026
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Icelandic Formula Offroad 2025
programme.desc: Formula Off Road was invented in Iceland. Hoping to raise more money for the Icelandic rescue teams, the teams began showing their 4WD cars in action in the Icelandic hills. (Station info).

programme.title: US Pro Pulling 2023
programme.sub-title: Mackville, Wisconsin, Unlimited Super Stock Tractors
programme.desc: Motorsport like you've never seen it before. In this competition, drivers use multi-engine, modified tractors to pull a heavy sled around the track. Some tractors can even produce more than 12,000 horsepower. This makes tractor pulling the strongest motorsport in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: With us, television becomes a shopping mall: Our teleshopping partners bring interesting and innovative products from the areas of kitchen, household, beauty, wellness, leisure and fitness directly into the living room of TV viewers. (Station info).

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.title: Mill Of The Stone Women
programme.desc: In 19th century Holland, a professor of fine arts and an unlicensed surgeon run a secret lab where the professor's ill daughter receives blood-transfusions from kidnapped female victims who posthumously become macabre art.

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Cyclone
programme.desc: After a surprise cyclone hits the area, tourists become stranded on a boat in the sea, and they have to do anything in order to survive. To make matters even worse, they're joined by the survivors of a plane crash and a sinking boat.

programme.title: Hondo

programme.title: Cyclone

programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Aledo, Texas
programme.desc: Years after the body of a young woman is found strangled to death in a creek bed, law enforcement finally closes the case; a closer look raises questions about the investigation.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Vinalhaven, Maine
programme.desc: On a remote island, a dispute between two lobstermen is settled the way islanders do: face-to-face; the conflict turns deadly when one swings an ax - leaving locals to dispute whether the death was self-defense or murder.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Benton, MO
programme.desc: After a teenage girl is found murdered in her car on the side of a highway, a stranger from out of town is convicted of her murder; when the deputy who originally discovered the body becomes sheriff, he calls everything into question.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Wahpeton, ND
programme.desc: When the body of a missing student is discovered in the river near a small college town, the community questions the role law enforcement may have played in his death.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: New Albany, Mississippi
programme.desc: When a beloved member of a tight-knit community is killed, the town cries out for immediate justice; after a young man is sentenced to death for the crime, and an out-of-town lawyer argues they convicted an innocent man.

programme.title: True Crime Story
programme.sub-title: It Couldn't Happen Here: Prichard, Alabama
programme.desc: The murder of a gender-nonconforming Black teenager remains unsolved despite pressure from family and friends - raising issues about the increase of violence, and the lack of justice for trans murder victims across the country.

programme.desc: A desperate single mother is arrested for shoplifting and thrown into a small-town jail; less than three months later she winds up dead after her pleas for help are dismissed for 19 hours.

programme.desc: When a high school girl goes missing, local townspeople believe a satanic cult is to blame; suspected cult members, including the lead police investigator, are arrested for the girl's murder.

The fact that the number of deaths in motorcycle accidents in Germany is falling is due, among other things, to the constant improvement of crash helmets. The helmet manufacturer Schuberth in Magdeburg plays a large part in these life-saving developments. Around 350 employees manufacture all kinds of protective helmets here.
